home.seoText: SwissCleanMove is your professional moving company in Biel/Bienne (Canton of Bern) and your reliable relocation partner in Bern and Zurich – operating throughout Switzerland. We organize private moves, corporate relocations, office moves and furniture transport, including packing services, dismantling and assembly, and punctual execution according to Swiss quality standards. For a stress-free apartment handover, we provide end-of-lease cleaning with a 100% handover guarantee. We thoroughly clean kitchens, bathrooms, windows, floors, doors and all required areas following strict quality guidelines. For companies, property managers and businesses, we offer maintenance cleaning, office cleaning, stairwell cleaning and commercial cleaning – reliable, discreet and professionally managed. Additionally, we provide full facility service and property maintenance (regular inspections, minor repairs, winter service, green area maintenance), professional gastronomy cleaning for restaurants, hotels and commercial kitchens, construction cleaning (rough, detailed and final cleaning), as well as clearance and disposal services with environmentally responsible waste separation. SwissCleanMove stands for clear processes, transparent quotations, 24-hour response time and visible results – in Biel, Bern, Zurich, Basel, Solothurn, Aargau, Neuchâtel, Fribourg, Jura, Lucerne and across Switzerland.

authority.umzugsreinigung: Stress-free apartment handover thanks to our professional final cleaning with a 100% handover guarantee – in all Swiss cantons.

story.title: About us
story.description:
SwissCleanMove is your professional partner for moving, move-out cleaning with handover guarantee, maintenance cleaning, and facility services in Switzerland.

Based in Biel/Bienne, we serve private clients, businesses, and administrations in Bern, Zurich, and throughout Switzerland with reliable services according to Swiss quality standards.

Professional. Reliable. Nationwide.

privacy.generalText: The following information provides a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit our website. Personal data is all data that can be used to identify you personally.
privacy.whoResponsible: Who is responsible for data collection?
privacy.whoResponsibleText: Data processing on this website is carried out by the website operator. You can find their contact details in the legal notice of this website.
privacy.howCollect: How do we collect your data?
privacy.howCollectText: Your data is collected on the one hand by you providing it to us. This can be data that you enter in a contact form, for example.
privacy.whyUse: What do we use your data for?
privacy.whyUseText: Part of the data is collected to ensure error-free provision of the website. Other data may be used to analyze your user behavior.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right at any time:
rightsList: to receive free information about the origin, recipient and purpose of your stored personal data
to request correction or deletion of this data
to request a restriction of data processing
privacy.contactFormText: If you send us inquiries via contact form, your details from the inquiry form including the contact data you provided there will be stored with us for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions.

terms.scopeText: These Terms and Conditions apply to all contracts between SwissCleanMove and its customers for the provision of cleaning, moving, and facility services.
terms.contractText: The contract is concluded by the customer's acceptance of the offer. Acceptance can be made in writing, orally or through conclusive behavior.
terms.pricingText1: Payment is made in cash directly to the team leader after the successful completion of the agreed services, unless otherwise agreed in writing.
terms.warrantyText: We guarantee the proper execution of our services. In case of defects, you have the right to free rectification. For move-out cleaning, we offer a 100% acceptance guarantee.
terms.liabilityText: We are only liable for damages in cases of intent and gross negligence. Liability is limited to the amount of the insurance sum. All our employees are fully insured.

cookies.whatAreText: Cookies are small text files that are stored by your web browser on your device to store certain information. Through the stored and returned information, the respective website recognizes that you have already called and visited it with the browser of your device.
cookies.necessaryText: These cookies are required for the basic functions of the website and cannot be deactivated. They are usually only set in response to actions you take.
cookies.functionalText: These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalization, such as storing your language settings.
cookies.manageText: You can change your cookie settings in your browser at any time. However, please note that deactivating certain cookies may affect the functionality of our website.

servicesPages.seoText: SwissCleanMove provides professional moving and cleaning services throughout Switzerland. We plan and execute private and corporate relocations, including secure furniture transport and structured organization. For property handovers, we offer end-of-lease cleaning with a full guarantee. We also provide regular maintenance cleaning, office cleaning and facility services for businesses and property managers. Our portfolio is completed by gastronomy cleaning, construction cleaning and professional clearance services – ensuring all services are delivered with Swiss precision and reliability.

pricing.seoText: The cost of moving and end-of-lease cleaning depends on property size, distance, floor level, elevator availability and preferred date. Maintenance cleaning, gastronomy cleaning and facility services are calculated individually based on scope and property requirements. SwissCleanMove provides a free and transparent quotation without hidden costs – for private relocations, corporate moves, cleaning services and clearance across Switzerland.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Here you will find answers to the most common questions about our professional moving, cleaning, and facility services across Switzerland.
faq.keyInfo: Key information you should know about SwissCleanMove
faq.teamHelp: Our friendly team is here to help. Contact us through any of these channels.

general.question: Does SwissCleanMove operate throughout Switzerland?
general.answer: Yes, we offer our services (moving, cleaning, facility services) nationwide, with a focus on the Seeland, Bern, Zurich, Basel, and other regions.

general.question: How can I request a quote?
general.answer: You can easily request a free, no-obligation quote using the online form on our website.

general.question: Are your employees insured?
general.answer: Yes, all our employees are fully insured, and we hold comprehensive public liability insurance.

general.question: Do you offer on-site visits?
general.answer: Yes, for larger moves or extensive cleaning jobs, we offer free on-site viewings.

general.question: How long does it take to receive a quote?
general.answer: You will generally receive our quote within 24 hours of your request.

general.question: Can services be combined?
general.answer: Yes, we offer attractive combination packages, for example, moving and end-of-lease cleaning from a single source.

general.question: What payment methods do you accept?
general.answer: You can pay conveniently by invoice, bank transfer, or cash (by arrangement).

general.question: Do you work on weekends?
general.answer: Yes, by prior arrangement, we also carry out moves and cleaning on weekends.

umzug.question: What is included in the moving service?
umzug.answer: Our moving service includes safe transport, optional furniture assembly/disassembly, and optional packing services and materials.

umzug.question: Do you offer furniture disassembly and assembly?
umzug.answer: Yes, our trained staff will gladly handle the professional disassembly and assembly of your furniture.

umzug.question: Do you provide moving boxes?
umzug.answer: Yes, we can deliver moving boxes and other packing materials to you well ahead of the move.

umzug.question: Are my belongings insured during the move?
umzug.answer: Yes, your household goods are covered by our transport insurance throughout the entire moving process.

umzug.question: Do you also do commercial moves?
umzug.answer: Absolutely. We have a lot of experience with office and commercial relocations, minimizing your company's downtime.

umzug.question: How do I calculate the volume of my move?
umzug.answer: You can use our online calculator or arrange a free viewing where we estimate the volume for you.

umzug.question: What happens if something is damaged during the move?
umzug.answer: Should damage occur despite our utmost care, it is covered by our insurance and handled straightforwardly.

umzug.question: Do you transport heavy items like pianos?
umzug.answer: Yes, we have the necessary equipment and expertise for transporting heavy items like pianos or safes.

umzug.question: Can I help with the move?
umzug.answer: Yes, you are welcome to help in order to reduce costs. We are happy to discuss this with you beforehand.

umzug.question: How far in advance should I plan the move?
umzug.answer: We recommend contacting us at least 4 to 6 weeks before your desired date to secure your preferred slot.

reinigung.question: Do you bring your own cleaning supplies?
reinigung.answer: Yes, we bring all necessary professional and eco-friendly cleaning supplies and equipment.

reinigung.question: Do you offer regular maintenance cleaning?
reinigung.answer: Yes, we offer regular cleaning services for private homes, offices, and commercial spaces (weekly, bi-weekly, etc.).

reinigung.question: Do you guarantee the quality of the cleaning?
reinigung.answer: Yes, we work according to strict Swiss quality standards and regularly check our work.

reinigung.question: Do you also clean windows and blinds?
reinigung.answer: Yes, professional window and blind cleaning is one of our core competencies.

reinigung.question: What is construction cleaning?
reinigung.answer: Construction cleaning involves rough, fine, and final cleaning of new builds or after renovations so the property is ready for move-in.

reinigung.question: Are your cleaning products eco-friendly?
reinigung.answer: We place great emphasis on sustainability and use eco-friendly and biodegradable cleaning products wherever possible.

reinigung.question: Do you also offer carpet cleaning?
reinigung.answer: Yes, we have special equipment for the professional deep cleaning of carpets and upholstered furniture.

reinigung.question: How is discretion ensured during office cleaning?
reinigung.answer: Our staff are contractually bound to confidentiality and work discreetly so as not to disrupt your business operations.

reinigung.question: Can you clean outside of our office hours?
reinigung.answer: Of course. We are happy to adapt our cleaning times to your business hours (e.g., early morning or evening).

reinigung.question: Will it always be the same cleaner?
reinigung.answer: For regular contracts, we strive to assign the same staff to build continuity and trust.

umzugsreinigung.question: What does 'with handover guarantee' mean?
umzugsreinigung.answer: We guarantee that the property management will accept the cleaning at the handover. If re-cleaning is needed, we do it for free.

umzugsreinigung.question: Do you have to be present at the handover?
umzugsreinigung.answer: Yes, for the final cleaning with handover guarantee, a manager from our team is always present at the official apartment handover.

umzugsreinigung.question: How much does a move-out cleaning cost?
umzugsreinigung.answer: The price depends on the size (number of rooms, square meters) and the level of dirt. We will gladly provide a fixed-price quote.

umzugsreinigung.question: Are windows and blinds included in the final cleaning?
umzugsreinigung.answer: Yes, our standard move-out cleaning includes the cleaning of windows (inside/outside) and blinds.

umzugsreinigung.question: Do you also clean secondary rooms like basements or balconies?
umzugsreinigung.answer: Yes, balconies, basements, attics, and garages can be included in the final cleaning upon request.

umzugsreinigung.question: What happens if the landlord is not satisfied with the cleaning?
umzugsreinigung.answer: Thanks to our handover guarantee, we rectify any complaints immediately and at no extra cost, right on site during the handover.

umzugsreinigung.question: How long does a typical final cleaning take?
umzugsreinigung.answer: Depending on the apartment size, a final cleaning usually takes 1 to 2 working days. We coordinate the date so the handover happens on time.

umzugsreinigung.question: Does the apartment have to be completely empty for the final cleaning?
umzugsreinigung.answer: Yes, for a flawless final cleaning, the apartment must be swept clean and completely emptied.

hauswartung.question: What does your property maintenance service include?
hauswartung.answer: Our service includes stairwell cleaning, exterior maintenance, winter service, minor repairs, and checking the building technology.

hauswartung.question: Who is your property maintenance service suitable for?
hauswartung.answer: We maintain apartment buildings, residential complexes, office buildings, and commercial properties for property managers and owners.

hauswartung.question: Do you also offer winter service?
hauswartung.answer: Yes, we offer a reliable winter service including snow removal and salting.

hauswartung.question: Are minor repairs also carried out?
hauswartung.answer: Yes, our technical maintenance team handles minor repairs like changing lightbulbs or adjusting doors.

hauswartung.question: Is an on-call service available for emergencies?
hauswartung.answer: Yes, for our property maintenance clients, we offer a 24/7 on-call service for emergencies (e.g., heating failure, burst pipe).

hauswartung.question: How often are you on-site?
hauswartung.answer: The interval (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly) is determined individually according to your needs and the property's requirements.

facility.question: What are Facility Services?
facility.answer: Facility Services encompass the holistic management and maintenance of buildings, including cleaning, technology, security, and exterior areas.

facility.question: Do you offer Facility Services for large enterprises?
facility.answer: Yes, we have the capacity and experience to offer tailored facility services even for large office and commercial complexes.

facility.question: Can I book individual services from Facility Service?
facility.answer: Of course. You can flexibly choose the services you need from our portfolio.

facility.question: Is there a dedicated contact person?
facility.answer: Yes, you will be assigned a dedicated property manager as your central point of contact for all matters relating to your property.

facility.question: Do you also create individual maintenance plans?
facility.answer: Yes, we analyze your property and create a tailored maintenance and upkeep plan.

facility.question: How do you ensure the quality of the Facility Services?
facility.answer: Through regular quality controls, trained staff, and transparent documentation of our services.

pricing.question: Are your quotes binding?
pricing.answer: Our quotes for final cleanings and moves are generally binding flat rates. There are no hidden costs.

pricing.question: How are moving costs calculated?
pricing.answer: Costs are based on the volume of goods, distance, floor level, elevator availability, and additional services like packing.

pricing.question: Are there surcharges for weekend work?
pricing.answer: Statutory surcharges may apply for work on Sundays and public holidays. Saturdays are often available at normal rates (depending on the job).

pricing.question: Is VAT included in the prices?
pricing.answer: On our quotes, we clearly state whether the prices are exclusive or inclusive of the statutory value-added tax.

pricing.question: Do I have to pay a deposit?
pricing.answer: For larger jobs or special services, a deposit may be agreed upon. This will be transparently indicated in the quote.

pricing.question: Do regular customers get special rates?
pricing.answer: Yes, for regular contracts (like maintenance cleaning), we offer attractive framework agreements and conditions.

guarantees.question: How high is your insurance coverage?
guarantees.answer: We hold comprehensive public liability and transport insurance covering damages up to several million francs.

guarantees.question: What do you do in the event of a claim?
guarantees.answer: We immediately report the damage to our insurance and ensure a quick and smooth settlement for you.

guarantees.question: Is the handover guarantee time-limited?
guarantees.answer: The handover guarantee is valid for the official handover appointment with the property management. We are on-site and resolve defects immediately.

guarantees.question: Do your employees have clean criminal records?
guarantees.answer: Yes, we require a current and flawless criminal record extract from all our permanent employees upon hiring.

guarantees.question: How do you ensure deadlines are met?
guarantees.answer: Through careful planning, sufficient staff reserves, and our commitment to Swiss punctuality and reliability.

guarantees.question: What happens if cleaning staff are absent?
guarantees.answer: In the event of illness or holidays, we immediately provide a qualified substitute so your service continues without interruption.

umzugBiel.h1: Moving company Biel/Bienne – moving, moving cleaning & cleaning in Biel/Bienne
umzugBiel.heroSubtitle: Professional moves in Seeland – carefully planned, efficiently carried out and fairly calculated.
umzugBiel.intro: Are you planning a move to Biel/Bienne or the Zealand region? Changing apartments is often associated with stress, logistical challenges and a lot of time. SwissCleanMove is your tried and tested local moving company based directly in Biel at Orpundstrasse 31. Since 2024, we have been supporting private individuals, families and companies with their move - be it within the city of Biel, to the surrounding communities or throughout Switzerland. Our experienced team will ensure that your move is stress-free, on time and at an absolutely transparent price. With over 50 successfully completed moves in the Biel and Zealand area, we have the necessary experience to master every order with precision. Whether you are moving from a cramped old town apartment in Biel, changing your family home in Seeland or moving into new office space as a company - we have the right solution. We offer you fair flat-rate prices starting from CHF 490, use 2-4 strong rein helpers as required and provide modern transport vehicles. We always include comprehensive transport insurance so that your valuable furniture is optimally protected. We usually complete your move within 1-2 days. Since we are based directly on Lake Biel, you benefit from extremely short journeys and a high level of flexibility. We are even available for you within 24 hours if things need to be done particularly quickly.

sections.heading: Why SwissCleanMove is your first choice in Biel/Bienne
sections.body: Choosing the right moving company is a matter of trust. We are not an anonymous moving platform where you don't know who will be at your door on moving day. SwissCleanMove is a firmly established, local company in Biel. When you contact us, you will speak to real contacts from the region who know the local conditions very well - from the narrow streets of Biel's old town to the modern residential areas by the lake. Our pricing is 100% transparent. After a free viewing, you will receive a fixed price offer with no hidden costs or unpleasant surprises at the end of the day. Our team consists of well-trained, strong and careful moving helpers who transport moving goods safely every day. With more than 50 successfully completed moves in Seeland, we have proven that we meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Regardless of whether you are moving from a small student apartment or a large single-family home – your satisfaction is our top priority.

sections.heading: Our comprehensive moving services
sections.body: As a full-service moving company, we cover every aspect of your home or business move. You can book exactly the services you need. Below we will introduce you to our individual services in detail.

sections.heading: Private removals in Biel and the surrounding area
sections.body: A private move is a big step. We accompany you from the initial planning through to moving into your new home. Our team will ensure the safe transport of your furniture, boxes and personal items. We know that many objects have not only material but also high emotional value. That's why we work with the greatest caution, use professional protective material such as reins and stretch film and secure everything professionally in the transport vehicle. Whether you are moving into an apartment in the city center of Biel, into a single-family home in Brügg or into an attic apartment in Nidau ​​- we can handle every situation, including narrow stairwells and difficult parking conditions. This service is aimed at families, couples and singles who want a smooth experience without physical overload. Customers choose us for private removals because they value our punctuality, care and local roots.

sections.heading: Company moves and office moves
sections.body: A company move requires meticulous planning so that the disruption to operations is kept as short as possible. We relocate your office, practice or shop to the new location efficiently and systematically. Our service includes the safe transport of IT infrastructure, file archives, heavy desks and conference furniture. We work to a strict schedule so that your employees can get back to work as quickly as possible. If necessary, we can also carry out office moves on weekends so as not to disrupt your business processes. This service is aimed at start-ups, SMEs and large companies in Zealand that need fast and reliable relocation. Business customers trust in SwissCleanMove because we guarantee maximum reliability, have strong transport insurance and, as a local Biel company, can react quickly to changes in plans.

sections.heading: Packing and unpacking service
sections.body: Packing all of your household belongings is one of the most time-consuming tasks when moving. Our professional packing and unpacking service completely takes this burden off your shoulders. Our experienced employees will pack your dishes, glasses, clothes, books and decorative objects safely in unbreakable moving boxes. We bring all the necessary packaging materials such as tissue paper, bubble wrap and special boxes for clothing with us. If you wish, we will put everything back exactly into your cupboards at your new place of residence. This service is ideal for busy professionals, older people or families who simply don't have the time for this preparatory work. Our customers value this service because it massively reduces the stress factor before moving day and ensures that even sensitive items survive transport undamaged.

sections.heading: Furniture assembly and disassembly
sections.body: Modern cupboards, complex bed systems or expansive shelves often cannot be transported in one go. Our trained staff will professionally dismantle your large furniture at the point where you move it out and reassemble it in a stable and precise manner at your destination. We bring all the necessary tools with us and ensure that no screws are lost. Whether it's classic IKEA furniture or expensive solid wood cabinets, we know exactly how the designs work. This service is aimed at anyone who doesn't have the time or the right tools to assemble furniture. Customers choose our furniture assembly because they can sleep in their newly assembled bed on the first evening in their new home without having to deal with construction instructions.

sections.heading: Use of furniture lifts
sections.body: In many buildings, especially old buildings or houses without an elevator, carrying heavy furniture through narrow stairwells is risky and time-consuming. Our modern furniture lift is used here. We transport sofas, refrigerators, pianos and heavy cupboards safely and efficiently over the balcony or through large windows directly into your apartment. This not only protects your furniture, but also the staircase from scratches and damage. The use of a lift also speeds up the moving process enormously. This service is intended for customers who live on upper floors or who need to transport particularly bulky items. SwissCleanMove was chosen because we have the technical equipment directly in-house and coordinate the operation safely and professionally.

sections.heading: Safe transport and logistics
sections.body: The core competency of every move is safe transport. Our fleet of modern 3.5 ton and 7.5 ton moving trucks is specially equipped for the safe transport of furniture. All vehicles have air suspension, lifting platforms and sufficient fastening options. We load the vehicles systematically so that the weight is optimally distributed and nothing can slip. We guarantee direct transport without unnecessary stops from the old to the new address, be it within Zealand or across Switzerland. This service is aimed at everyone who wants to know their belongings are in safe hands. Customers trust us because our drivers have extensive experience and comprehensive transport insurance covers any potential damage.

sections.heading: Disposal of old furniture
sections.body: When packing, you often realize that many items, old furniture or defective electrical appliances should not be taken into the new apartment. We relieve you of the time-consuming driving to the factory yard and take care of the environmentally friendly and professional disposal directly on the day of the move. We separate the materials (wood, metal, electronics, bulky goods) and dispose of them in the appropriate recycling centers in the Biel region. This service is perfect for people who want to downsize, contract or simply make room for something new while moving. Customers value this service because they receive everything from a single source and can leave the place they are moving out completely swept clean and free of contaminated sites.

sections.heading: How to optimally prepare for moving day (guide)
sections.body: A good preparation is half reining. We recommend that you start sorting out unused items early - the less you have to transport, the cheaper the move will be. Label your moving boxes clearly on the side (not just the top) with the contents and the target room in the new apartment (e.g. "Kitchen/Dishes"). Put heavy things like books on the bottom and in small boxes, light things like clothes on top. Also have a small “survival box” ready. It should contain important documents, keys, medication, a charging cable, some cash, toilet paper and snacks for moving day. Make sure you reserve a parking space in front of both apartments in good time - if necessary, we at SwissCleanMove will be happy to set up no-parking zones for you.

serviceBullets: Free on-site visit
Guaranteed flat rate price with no hidden costs
Experienced, strong and polite rein helpers
Complete transport insurance for your belongings
Modern moving wagons (3.5t and 7.5t)
Flexible, local and available within 24 hours

umzugBiel.serviceAreaBody: As a strongly rooted moving company with headquarters in Biel/Bienne, we travel throughout Seeland every day for our customers. Our teams know the local conditions and traffic routes very well. We regularly support customers in Biel/Bienne, Nidau, Brügg, Ipsach, Lyss, Aarberg and Pieterlen. We also serve all the communities around the idyllic Lake Biel and carry out moves from this region to the whole of Switzerland. No matter where you live in Seeland – we will get to you quickly.

faqs.question: How much does a professional move cost in Biel/Bienne?
faqs.answer: The costs of moving in Biel/Bienne depend heavily on the volume of your household goods, the size of the apartment, the distance between the two places of residence and the additional services you choose. At SwissCleanMove we offer you attractive flat-rate prices starting at CHF 490. This already includes the use of 2-4 rein helpers, the transport trolley and transport insurance. We don't charge any hidden fees. After a free viewing, you will receive a binding offer from us.

faqs.question: Is my furniture insured during transport?
faqs.answer: Yes, of course. Comprehensive transport and business liability insurance is included as standard in the flat rate for each of our moves. If, contrary to expectations, damage occurs to your furniture, the building or the stairwell, our insurance will assume full liability. However, our staff is intensively trained and uses professional protective material to minimize the risk of damage from the outset.

faqs.question: Do you also offer removals on weekends?
faqs.answer: Yes, we know that many of our customers are heavily involved in work during the week. That's why we also carry out removals on Fridays and Saturdays upon request. However, we recommend reserving weekend dates as early as possible, as these are particularly popular and often book up quickly.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book the move in Biel?
faqs.answer: In order to guarantee your desired date, we recommend booking about 4 to 6 weeks in advance, especially if your move falls at the end of the month or on a Friday. However, since we are locally based in Biel, we can react at very short notice in emergencies or very urgent matters and are often available within 24 hours.

faqs.question: Will you disassemble and assemble my furniture?
faqs.answer: Yes, the professional dismantling and safe assembly of furniture is one of our core competencies. Our rein helpers are equipped with the right tools and have extensive experience with all common furniture systems (e.g. IKEA, Pfister, USM Haller). During the viewing, please tell us which pieces of furniture need to be dismantled so that we can allow enough time for this.

faqs.question: Do I have to get the packaging material myself?
faqs.answer: That's entirely up to you. We are happy to provide you with high-quality moving materials such as sturdy moving boxes, clothing boxes, tissue paper and bubble wrap. You can either purchase these from us in advance and pack them yourself, or you can book our complete packing service, where we bring all the material with us on the day of the move and take care of the packing for you.

faqs.question: How long does a typical move take?
faqs.answer: An average move of a 3.5 to 4.5 room apartment within the Zealand region is usually completed in a single day (approx. 1-2 days total for larger properties). We usually start early in the morning so that you can relax in your new home by late afternoon or evening. The exact duration depends on the volume and the walking distances.

faqs.question: Do you dispose of furniture that I no longer need?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a convenient disposal service on moving day. We take furniture, defective appliances or bulky items that should not be taken into the new apartment with us and dispose of them professionally and in an environmentally friendly manner at the local recycling centers in Biel. The disposal costs are billed transparently based on effort and volume.

faqs.question: Do you also work in the neighboring communities of Biel?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our catchment area is not limited to the city center of Biel/Bienne. We are in action every day in the surrounding communities such as Nidau, Lyss, Brügg, Ipsach, Aarberg and Pieterlen. We also carry out further moves from or to Zealand and throughout Switzerland without any problems.

faqs.question: How do I organize no-parking zones for the moving van?
faqs.answer: Parking the moving truck as close to the entrance as possible is essential for an efficient move. If there is no sufficient parking space in front of your old or new place of residence in Biel, we can apply to the local police or municipality for a temporary no-parking zone and put up the appropriate traffic signs. It is best to clarify this with us during the viewing.

faqs.question: Can I book the final cleaning at the same time?
faqs.answer: Yes, SwissCleanMove is a full-service agency. In addition to transport, we also offer professional final cleaning with a 100% acceptance guarantee. If you book both services as a combined package with us, you will not only benefit from a smooth process through the same contact person, but usually also from an attractive price advantage.

faqs.question: Are your employees permanently employed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes, we attach great importance to seriousness and quality. All of our cleaning staff and moving helpers are permanently employed by SwissCleanMove, are paid fairly and are insured against accidents. We do not use anonymous day laborers and instead rely on a well-rehearsed, trustworthy team from the region.

endreinigungBiel.h1: Final cleaning company Biel/Bienne – final cleaning, apartment cleaning & cleaning in Biel/Bienne
endreinigungBiel.heroSubtitle: Your apartment in Biel will be handed over so clean that the deposit is guaranteed to be returned.
endreinigungBiel.intro: Changing your apartment in Biel/Bienne involves many tasks - the most strenuous of which is usually the final cleaning. SwissCleanMove is your reliable partner for professional final cleaning with a 100% acceptance guarantee. We ensure that your old apartment in Biel or the surrounding area is spotlessly clean and that the property management accepts the inspection without hesitation. If there are any complaints when the apartment is handed over, we will be there personally and make improvements immediately free of charge - so you are guaranteed to receive your rental deposit back. With our experience from numerous final cleanings throughout Seeland, fair flat-rate prices starting from CHF 350 and short response times (available within 24 hours), we take this stress factor away from you completely. A typical apartment cleaning for us takes between 4 and 8 hours, depending on the size and degree of dirt. Rely on our expertise right on Lake Biel and dedicate yourself entirely to furnishing your new home.

sections.heading: The best choice for your move cleaning in Biel/Bienne
sections.body: When it comes to apartment acceptance, Swiss property management companies know no compromises. Limescale deposits, overlooked joints or dusty blinds can quickly lead to acceptance being refused and part of your deposit being retained. This is exactly where SwissCleanMove comes into play. We are a locally based cleaning company in Biel and know exactly what the administrations in the Zealand region pay attention to during the handover. We do not work with hourly wages, where the costs skyrocket incalculably, but we always offer you a transparent fixed price offer. Our experienced cleaning team arrives with professional, environmentally friendly cleaning products and modern equipment. We leave your apartment not just superficially clean, but clean deep down to the pores. Trust in a local partner who delivers what he promises.

sections.heading: Our specialized cleaning services in detail
sections.body: A thorough final cleaning consists of many pieces of the puzzle. Below we will describe in detail what our services in Biel/Bienne include, who they are aimed at and why our customers always count on us.

sections.heading: Kitchen cleaning (deep cleaning)
sections.body: The kitchen is the absolute test of every apartment handover. Our specialists clean all built-in appliances such as ovens, hobs, refrigerators (including defrosting and disinfecting), steam vents and dishwashers extremely meticulously. We remove even heavily burned-on grease and stubborn limescale residues without leaving any residue. The kitchen cupboards and drawers are washed inside and out, and the hard-to-reach places such as the area behind the refrigerator or above the wall cupboards are also dusted. This service is aimed at tenants who want to make sure that the management has nothing to complain about when inspecting the kitchen. Customers choose us for this area because our special cleaners remove even the most stubborn dirt without damaging the sensitive surfaces of modern kitchens.

sections.heading: Bathrooms and sanitary facilities
sections.body: Limescale, mold deposits and soap residue are the biggest enemies when cleaning the bathroom. We descale fittings, shower walls, bathtubs and sinks with the greatest care. We pay particular attention to the joints, the toilet and the drain, which we hygienically clean and disinfect. Mirrors, bathroom cabinets and ventilation grilles are also cleaned streak-free. This service is crucial for anyone living in hard water regions (such as parts of Zealand) where limescale is a massive problem. Our customers rely on us because we can restore even older bathrooms to a sparkling, hygienic condition.

sections.heading: Window and blind cleaning
sections.body: Sparkling clean windows make the entire apartment appear brighter and neater. Our team cleans all window glass streak-free, both inside and out. More importantly, we clean the window frames, the often neglected window sills and the window rabbets, where dirt and insects tend to collect. The cleaning of the roller shutters, blinds and sun blinds (slat by slat, including guide rails) is also part of this service. This service is aimed at tenants of apartments with large window fronts or sophisticated glazing, for example in modern lofts in Biel. Customers appreciate our technology because we remove even stubborn street dirt and traces of weather efficiently and gently.

sections.heading: Floor cleaning and maintenance
sections.body: Every floor covering requires specific care. Whether real wooden parquet, laminate, ceramic tiles, PVC or carpet – we know how to treat the respective surface. We vacuum all floors thoroughly, remove cobwebs from the skirting boards and wipe the surfaces with a damp cloth. For parquet floors, we ensure gentle cleaning; for tiled floors, we also remove stubborn dirt from the joints. This service is aimed at every tenant moving out, as a well-kept floor is the first impression when inspecting the apartment. We are often booked because we use professional machines and special cleaners that are gentle on materials and bring the shine back to the floors.

sections.heading: Wall, ceiling and door cleaning
sections.body: Often forgotten, but very important during inspection: cobwebs on the ceilings, dusty light switches, sockets and door frames. We remove dust and light dirt from the walls, clean all interior doors including door handles with a damp cloth and remove accumulated dust from radiators. Built-in cupboards are completely cleared out and wiped down with a damp cloth. This service is important for all customers who have lived in their apartment and want to ensure that no signs of wear and tear are overlooked at eye level. Customers praise us for this attention to detail, which is often neglected during standard cleaning.

sections.heading: Balcony, terrace and outdoor areas
sections.body: A well-kept outdoor area is just as much a part of the apartment as the living room. We sweep and mop the floors of balconies and terraces, clean the railings and remove coarse dirt such as bird droppings or moss. We also sweep the associated cellar compartments, garage boxes or screeds and remove cobwebs. This service is aimed at tenants with outdoor areas or additional ancillary rooms. Customers are happy about this service because these areas are often used as temporary storage until the end and the cleaning is otherwise lost in the stress.

sections.heading: This is how the apartment handover works (guide)
sections.body: The home inspection is the moment of truth. We recommend that you remove all personal items and furniture from the apartment a few days before our cleaning appointment so that we can work unhindered. Fill dowel holes in the walls professionally in a timely manner if your rental agreement requires this (there are often misunderstandings with the administration here). Clarify with your landlord in advance whether special maintenance work (such as replacing filters in the steam extractor or descaling the boiler) must be carried out by you as the tenant. On the day of acceptance, a SwissCleanMove representative will be present in person upon request. We will go through the acceptance protocol together with you and the administration. If the landlord finds a tiny detail that isn't perfect, our employee will immediately grab a rag and make improvements. You can sit back, relax and hand over the keys.

faqs.question: What exactly does the 100% acceptance guarantee mean?
faqs.answer: Our 100% acceptance guarantee means absolute security and freedom from stress for you. We contractually guarantee that your property will be accepted by the management or owner without any problems after our final cleaning. If the inspector nevertheless discovers a defect during the inspection of the apartment (e.g. a water stain on a fitting), our staff present will clean it immediately, unbureaucratically and completely free of charge until the inspection has been signed.

faqs.question: Do I have to be present during the final cleaning?
faqs.answer: No, that is not absolutely necessary. You can simply hand over the keys to our team in the morning and use the day for your move or work. We work independently and reliably. It is sufficient if you (and ideally the representative of the administration) are back on site for the official inspection of the apartment, at which we can also be present.

faqs.question: How long does it take to clean a typical apartment in Biel?
faqs.answer: The duration of the cleaning varies depending on the size of the apartment, the number of windows and the general level of dirt. As a guide, you can expect around 4 to 8 hours for a 3.5 room apartment. We usually send a well-rehearsed team of 2 to 3 people to complete the work quickly and thoroughly so that the handover can take place in the afternoon.

faqs.question: Are windows and blinds included in the price?
faqs.answer: Yes, our flat-rate final cleaning includes all essential components of the apartment. Of course, this also includes the windows (inside and outside), the window frames, the window sills and the blinds (roller shutters or blinds). The thorough cleaning of adjoining rooms such as the cellar or balcony is also taken into account in advance in the fixed price.

faqs.question: What happens when property management is extremely strict?
faqs.answer: Don't worry. We carry out numerous apartment handovers every week in Biel and throughout Seeland and are very familiar with the high demands of local administrations. Our teams clean to a detailed industry standard. If an administrator is exceptionally strict, our acceptance guarantee comes into effect - we clean the property free of charge until the administration signs the protocol.

faqs.question: Do you provide all cleaning supplies?
faqs.answer: Yes, you don't have to worry about anything. SwissCleanMove brings all the equipment with it: professional vacuum cleaners, special descaling and degreasing agents, microfiber cloths, ladders and all other necessary utensils. We also use environmentally friendly cleaning products that are effective against dirt but are gentle on the surfaces in your home.

faqs.question: Do you also fill drill holes in the walls (dowel holes)?
faqs.answer: Filling dowel holes is a small manual job that is not normally part of the classic basic cleaning. However, if you wish this and inform us in advance during the viewing, we can carry out this task professionally for you after consultation and for a small surcharge in order to avoid discussions with the administration.

faqs.question: Can I also have the final cleaning carried out on the weekend?
faqs.answer: Yes, we also offer appointments on Saturdays upon request. Since many people move on the weekend, these appointments are very popular. We therefore recommend that you contact us as early as possible to reserve your desired date for the final cleaning at the weekend in Biel.

faqs.question: How much does a final cleaning cost in Biel?
faqs.answer: Our prices are fair, transparent and calculated as a flat rate with no hidden costs. We clean a 2.5-room apartment from CHF 350, a 3.5-room apartment from CHF 490 and a 4.5-room apartment from CHF 690. For single-family homes or extremely dirty properties, we will provide you with an individual, binding offer after a free inspection.

faqs.question: What do you do about stubborn mold in the bathroom?
faqs.answer: We treat light, superficial mold in the joints (as it often occurs in unventilated bathrooms) with special, fungi-killing cleaners and usually completely remove it. However, if the mold has already penetrated deep into the silicone or masonry, this is structural damage that we cannot repair through cleaning alone. In such a case, we will point this out to you and the administration.

faqs.question: How quickly can I book a final cleaning with SwissCleanMove?
faqs.answer: Thanks to our local base directly in Biel/Bienne, we are very flexible. We can often respond to short-term requests within 24 to 48 hours, for example if you urgently need a cleaning company because another provider has canceled. In urgent cases, it is best to call us directly so that we can check capacities.

faqs.question: Do you also offer a combination of moving and cleaning?
faqs.answer: Yes! Many of our customers book the practical combination offer. If you commission SwissCleanMove for both the move and the final cleaning, you only have one contact person for the entire project. Scheduling is seamless (e.g. moving in the morning, cleaning in the afternoon or the following day), and we can often offer you an attractive discount for the entire package.

faqs.question: How much does an average move in Ipsach cost?
faqs.answer: We offer removals in Ipsach starting at a flat rate of CHF 490. This fixed price includes the moving wagon, the helpers and insurance. In order to provide you with an exact and binding offer, we would be happy to come to your location for a short, free inspection. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Are my furnishings insured?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely. Every move carried out by SwissCleanMove is covered by our comprehensive transport and business liability insurance. If, despite our caution, an object or the stairwell is damaged, we assume full responsibility. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: How far in advance do I have to book the appointment?
faqs.answer: We advise our customers in Ipsach to reserve the move about 3 to 4 weeks in advance, as the end of the month is particularly popular. However, since we are based locally, in urgent cases we can also intervene at short notice within 24 to 48 hours. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Do you also offer final cleaning with an acceptance guarantee?
faqs.answer: Yes. SwissCleanMove is your partner for the complete package. After you move out in Ipsach, we are happy to carry out the professional final cleaning with a 100% acceptance guarantee. When you book in combination, you benefit from an attractive discount. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Do I have to get the packaging material myself?
faqs.answer: You can decide whether you want to get the boxes yourself or use our high-quality material. We deliver sturdy moving boxes, clothing boxes and bubble wrap to Ipsach and, if requested, take this material back after the move. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Will you also disassemble my furniture?
faqs.answer: Yes, this is an integral part of our service. Large cupboards (e.g. from IKEA or Pfister) are professionally dismantled by our employees at the old place of residence and safely reassembled at the new location in Ipsach. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Do you also carry out removals on weekends?
faqs.answer: Yes, many of our customers prefer to move on the weekend so as not to disrupt the work week. If you book in advance, we are also available for you in Ipsach on Fridays and Saturdays. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Can you also dispose of old furniture?
faqs.answer: Yes, we take care of the disposal of unwanted furniture, old carpets or defective appliances. We load the bulky goods on the day of the move and take them directly to the responsible recycling centers in Seeland. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Are you organizing the barrier for the moving wagon?
faqs.answer: If there are no suitable parking options in front of your apartment in Ipsach, we will be happy to organize a temporary parking ban after consultation and put up the signs in consultation with the municipality. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: How big are your vehicles?
faqs.answer: We have modern, air-suspended moving trucks (3.5t) for smaller apartments and narrow streets as well as larger trucks (7.5t) for single-family homes. This is how we ensure that we have the right means of transport for every moving volume in Ipsach. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: How do you calculate the cost of this service?
faqs.answer: The calculation at SwissCleanMove is always transparent and fair. We either work with fixed prices (e.g. for final cleaning or moving), with fixed hourly rates or prices per square meter. We always recommend a free on-site inspection in order to be able to provide you with an exact and binding offer that includes absolutely all costs.

faqs.question: Do you provide the cleaning supplies and equipment you need?
faqs.answer: Yes, in the vast majority of cases we bring everything ourselves. For commercial cleaning, final cleaning and removals, our vehicles are fully equipped with professional vacuum cleaners, machines, cleaning agents, ladders and tools. We only use high-quality, material-friendly work equipment.

faqs.question: How quickly can appointments be booked?
faqs.answer: Thanks to our strong regional structure, we are extremely responsive. In emergencies, we can often mobilize a professional response team in the region within 24 to 48 hours. For work that can be planned, we recommend a lead time of one to two weeks.

faqs.question: What happens in the unlikely event of damage?
faqs.answer: Safety is our top priority. However, even with the greatest care, something can break. In this rare case, you as a customer are completely covered. We have extensive business and professional liability insurance that will ensure that any damage to your property is settled without any problems.

faqs.question: Do you use subcontractors for the work?
faqs.answer: No, not consciously. In order to maintain our high quality standards, we rely exclusively on our own, permanently employed staff. This guarantees quality and protects you as a customer from any liability risks associated with undeclared work or a lack of insurance.

faqs.question: Are your employees obliged to exercise discretion?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. This is particularly important in private households and offices. Each of our employees signs a strict confidentiality agreement. Data, files or private items are treated with absolute respect and discretion.

faqs.question: What types of cleaning products do you use?
faqs.answer: We focus on sustainability. We use professional, biodegradable and eco-certified Swiss cleaning products that effectively combat dirt and bacteria, but are gentle on surfaces and do not leave behind harmful fumes.

faqs.question: Can I flexibly reschedule an agreed appointment?
faqs.answer: We value flexibility. Appointments can be rescheduled in accordance with our general terms and conditions. If you are ill or on vacation, you can pause or postpone regular assignments in consultation with us without incurring additional costs.

faqs.question: How is payment made after deployment?
faqs.answer: Payment is easy. Once the service has been provided, you will receive a detailed invoice, which can be conveniently paid within 10 to 30 days. For regular services, we issue a clear collective invoice at the end of the month.

faqs.question: Do you offer a guarantee on the work carried out?
faqs.answer: Yes. For final cleaning after moving out, for example, we offer a 100% acceptance guarantee, which contractually obliges us to clean any defects free of charge by the administration. We also guarantee the highest quality for all other services.

faqs.question: Do I have to be present while the work is being carried out?
faqs.answer: This is not absolutely necessary. Many of our customers give us the key (often documented with a receipt) so that we can carry out the work while they are away. Of course you are also welcome to be on site.

faqs.question: Is it always the same person during regular missions?
faqs.answer: For recurring orders, we ensure that you are assigned a permanent team or a permanent reference person. We only organize professional representation in the event of vacation or illness.

sections.heading: Moving guide for Aarberg: How to make the move successful
sections.body: Careful planning prevents stress. We advise our customers in Aarberg not to load moving boxes too heavily (books in small boxes, clothes in large ones) and to clearly label them on the side with the destination room. You should always transport valuables and important documents personally. Since parking the truck directly in front of the house is crucial for a quick move, you should check early on whether parking spaces are available. If this is not the case in Aarberg (e.g. in the old town), please inform us in good time. We can then apply to the municipality for an official parking ban. sections.heading: Environmental awareness and sustainability in every use
sections.body: As a modern Swiss company, we take responsibility for our environment. We have consistently aligned our processes with sustainability. We primarily use biodegradable and eco-certified cleaning products that are effective against dirt but do not harm the flora and fauna in Switzerland. We also precisely dose water and chemical consumption. This protects the environment and protects the valuable surfaces of your furniture and floors. When it comes to transport, we also pay attention to optimized route planning in order to keep CO2 emissions low.

sections.heading: Security, insurance and absolute transparency
sections.body: If you give us access to your home or business premises, trust is the most important asset. All of our employees go through a strict selection process before being hired permanently. We also have comprehensive business and professional liability insurance. If an item is damaged during our work, you are fully covered. We take responsibility – without discussions. sections.heading: The advantages of our permanent staff

Our employees receive regular internal training on new technologies and safety regulations. You also benefit from often being able to greet the same familiar faces. You don’t have to worry about any administrative effort regarding AHV, SUVA or withholding tax – we take care of all of this. All you receive is a transparent invoice.

umzugBern.intro: Welcome to SwissCleanMove. Are you planning to move within the canton of Bern, are you moving to the federal city from another canton, or are you moving your residence from Bern to another region of Switzerland? A change of canton or a move in a far-reaching region like Bern requires the highest logistical precision. SwissCleanMove is your strong, reliable moving partner for the entire canton of Bern. With years of experience in the Swiss moving industry, we support families, individuals, seniors and companies in their relocation. Our goal is to relieve you of the stress and heavy physical work. We offer you transparent and guaranteed fixed flat-rate prices, which already include our modern, well-equipped moving wagons, our experienced team of moving people, as well as comprehensive transport and business liability insurance. We have no hidden costs or unforeseen hourly surcharges. Whether you are moving to the historic old town of Bern, to the picturesque communities around Lake Thun or to the Bernese Oberland - we manage every journey safely and on time. When it comes to urgent moves, we can often react very flexibly. Leave the work to us and start your new phase of life in a relaxed manner. Welcome to SwissCleanMove – your local premium partner. We offer you services according to the strictest Swiss standards. For us, transparency, punctuality and utmost care are our top priority. Trust in our permanently employed, competent team for a smooth transaction. Whether for private individuals or companies, we offer tailor-made solutions. Contact us for a free quote.

One of our greatest strengths is the personal, free on-site inspection. We accurately estimate your moving volume, check the access routes for our trucks and plan the entire process meticulously. sections.heading: Customer support and preparation tips (Bern guide)
sections.body: In order to make your move in the canton of Bern go smoothly, we recommend good preparation. Never pack moving boxes too heavily - the maximum weight should not exceed 20 kg (heavy books in small boxes). Label the boxes with the target area not only on the lid, but also on the side. Clarify early on whether there is enough parking space for our moving van at the move-out and move-in location. If you move in busy areas of Bern, an official parking ban is often necessary. We can apply for this for you at the responsible municipality or city police. Please also remember to report any address changes in good time to the Canton of Bern (residents control), the post office and your insurance companies. When moving between cantons (e.g. from Bern to Zurich), it is also important to note the meter readings for electricity and water on the day of the move together with the administration. faqs.question: Do you carry out moves throughout the canton of Bern?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely. We serve customers throughout the canton, including Bern City, the Bernese Oberland, the Emmental, the Seeland (Biel/Bienne) and the Oberaargau. We know the streets and local conditions very well. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Are intercantonal moves from Bern to other cantons possible?
faqs.answer: Yes, that is one of our specialties. We regularly carry out moves from Bern to Zurich, Basel, Solothurn, Freiburg, Neuchâtel or the rest of Switzerland. Distance plays no role for our modern fleet. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Are my belongings insured during the move?
faqs.answer: Yes, completely. Every move carried out by SwissCleanMove is protected by comprehensive transport insurance and business liability insurance. If there is any damage to the furniture or the staircase in Bern, we assume liability. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: How are moving costs for the canton of Bern calculated?
faqs.answer: We offer transparent flat-rate prices that are calculated based on the transport volume (size of the apartment), the distance and any additional services (such as assembly or furniture lift). After a free viewing you will receive a binding fixed price offer. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Are you applying for no-parking zones in the city of Bern?
faqs.answer: The parking situation in the city of Bern (particularly in the old town or in densely populated areas such as Länggasse) can be difficult. If you wish, we can apply for an official no-parking ban from the relevant police authority and put up the signs in a timely manner. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Can you also transport heavy objects such as pianos in Bern?
faqs.answer: Yes. We have the necessary equipment (risers, roller stands, furniture lifts) and the trained staff to safely transport heavy goods such as pianos, safes or solid oak tables. Please always specify such objects when requesting an offer. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Can I also purchase moving boxes from you in Bern?
faqs.answer: Yes, we will be happy to deliver high-quality moving boxes, clothing boxes (so that suits can be transported hanging) and bubble wrap directly to your home in the canton of Bern in advance of the move. You can rent or buy the material. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Do you also offer final cleaning of the old apartment in Bern?
faqs.answer: Of course. We are a full-service agency and, in addition to transport, we also offer you professional final cleaning with a 100% acceptance guarantee. If you book both together, you will benefit from a smooth process and often from a combination discount. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Do you dispose of old furniture on the day of the move?
faqs.answer: Yes. We will load up any items, furniture or electronic waste that you do not want to take with you to your new apartment and dispose of them professionally and in an environmentally friendly manner at the official recycling centers in the canton of Bern. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Do you also carry out company moves in Bern on weekends?
faqs.answer: Yes. We know that SMEs and practices need to avoid downtime at all costs. Upon request, we are also happy to plan and carry out company moves in Bern on Friday afternoons, Saturdays or Sundays so that you can continue working straight away on Monday. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: How big are the moving wagons you use?
faqs.answer: Our fleet includes modern 3.5-ton vans (ideal for narrow streets and smaller apartments in Bern) as well as large 7.5-ton trucks for single-family homes, office moves or long distances. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Will you dismantle and reassemble my cabinets?
faqs.answer: Yes, professional dismantling and stable assembly at the destination are part of our standard services. Our reinsmen are skilled craftsmen and always have the right tools with them. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: How do you calculate the cost of this service?
faqs.answer: The calculation at SwissCleanMove is always transparent and fair. We either work with fixed prices (e.g. for final cleaning or moving), with fixed hourly rates or prices per square meter. We always recommend a free on-site inspection in order to be able to provide you with an exact and binding offer that includes absolutely all costs.

faqs.question: Do you provide the cleaning supplies and equipment you need?
faqs.answer: Yes, in the vast majority of cases we bring everything ourselves. For commercial cleaning, final cleaning and removals, our vehicles are fully equipped with professional vacuum cleaners, machines, cleaning agents, ladders and tools. We only use high-quality, material-friendly work equipment.

faqs.question: How quickly can appointments be booked?
faqs.answer: Thanks to our strong regional structure, we are extremely responsive. In emergencies, we can often mobilize a professional response team in the region within 24 to 48 hours. For work that can be planned, we recommend a lead time of one to two weeks.

faqs.question: What happens in the unlikely event of damage?
faqs.answer: Safety is our top priority. However, even with the greatest care, something can break. In this rare case, you as a customer are completely covered. We have extensive business and professional liability insurance that will ensure that any damage to your property is settled without any problems.

faqs.question: Do you use subcontractors for the work?
faqs.answer: No, not consciously. In order to maintain our high quality standards, we rely exclusively on our own, permanently employed staff. This guarantees quality and protects you as a customer from any liability risks associated with undeclared work or a lack of insurance.

faqs.question: Are your employees obliged to exercise discretion?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. This is particularly important in private households and offices. Each of our employees signs a strict confidentiality agreement. Data, files or private items are treated with absolute respect and discretion.

faqs.question: What types of cleaning products do you use?
faqs.answer: We focus on sustainability. We use professional, biodegradable and eco-certified Swiss cleaning products that effectively combat dirt and bacteria, but are gentle on surfaces and do not leave behind harmful fumes.

faqs.question: Can I flexibly reschedule an agreed appointment?
faqs.answer: We value flexibility. Appointments can be rescheduled in accordance with our general terms and conditions. If you are ill or on vacation, you can pause or postpone regular assignments in consultation with us without incurring additional costs.

faqs.question: How is payment made after deployment?
faqs.answer: Payment is easy. Once the service has been provided, you will receive a detailed invoice, which can be conveniently paid within 10 to 30 days. For regular services, we issue a clear collective invoice at the end of the month.

faqs.question: Do you offer a guarantee on the work carried out?
faqs.answer: Yes. For final cleaning after moving out, for example, we offer a 100% acceptance guarantee, which contractually obliges us to clean any defects free of charge by the administration. We also guarantee the highest quality for all other services.

faqs.question: Do I have to be present while the work is being carried out?
faqs.answer: This is not absolutely necessary. Many of our customers give us the key (often documented with a receipt) so that we can carry out the work while they are away. Of course you are also welcome to be on site.

faqs.question: Is it always the same person during regular missions?
faqs.answer: For recurring orders, we ensure that you are assigned a permanent team or a permanent reference person. We only organize professional representation in the event of vacation or illness.

umzugZurich.intro: Welcome to SwissCleanMove. The canton of Zurich is the economic engine of Switzerland and one of the most dynamic living areas in Europe. A move in Zurich, be it within the city, to the agglomeration or a change of canton to Zurich, requires a moving company that combines maximum efficiency with absolute reliability. SwissCleanMove is your premium moving partner for Zurich and all of Switzerland. We completely relieve you of the physical strain and planning stress. Regardless of whether you are moving into a modern loft in Zurich West, moving into a house on the Gold Coast or moving your startup to larger offices - our experienced team will ensure everything runs smoothly. We offer you guaranteed flat-rate prices, which already include moving helpers, state-of-the-art transport vehicles and comprehensive transport insurance. No unforeseen hourly surcharges, no unpleasant surprises. We work quickly and professionally. Trust in Swiss moving quality when it comes to your move to, from or within Zurich. Greetings from SwissCleanMove! As your local expert, we know exactly what is important. We deliberately avoid using subcontractors and instead rely on our own, excellently trained specialist staff. Enjoy absolute cost transparency and Swiss premium quality. Whether for private individuals or companies, we offer tailor-made solutions. Contact us for a free quote.

As an experienced Swiss moving company, we know these pitfalls. We do not offer you off-the-shelf services, but rather tailor-made advice following a free on-site visit or a detailed online estimate. You decide whether we take care of the entire move, including VIP packing service, or just the safe transport of your heavy furniture. Our primary goal is to complete your change of residence in Zurich with absolutely no damage and within the agreed time frame. To achieve this, we rely on permanently employed, trained staff and state-of-the-art vehicles. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.body: Zurich real estate management is demanding, and the city's traffic does not tolerate improvisation. If you're driving with friends, you often risk getting fines for parking incorrectly or damaging your rented vehicle. A professional moving company like SwissCleanMove organizes the necessary parking bans (signaling permits) in advance with the city of Zurich (traffic department), brings the necessary know-how, roller stands and, above all, comprehensive transport insurance. We take all the logistical planning and heavy lifting away from you, so you can relax and look forward to your new home. sections.heading: Moving guide for the canton of Solothurn
sections.body: Careful planning prevents stress. We advise our customers in Solothurn not to load moving boxes too heavily (books in small boxes, clothes in large ones) and to clearly label them on the side with the destination room. You should always transport valuables and important documents personally. Since parking the truck directly in front of the house is crucial for a quick move, you should check early on whether parking spaces are available. If this is not the case (e.g. in the old town of Solothurn or Olten), please inform us in good time. We can then apply to the local authorities for an official parking ban. Also remember to read the meter reading (electricity/water) on the day of the move and set up forwarding orders at the post office in good time. You don’t have to worry about any administrative effort regarding AHV, SUVA or withholding tax – we take care of all of this. All you receive is a transparent invoice.

faqs.question: Do you carry out moves throughout the canton of Solothurn?

No matter whether you live in the Lebern, Olten, Gösgen, Thal or Wasseramt districts – we are there for you everywhere in the canton of Solothurn. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Will you dismantle and reassemble my cabinets?

We ensure that everything at your new place of residence in Solothurn is flawless and stable again. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Can you also dispose of old furniture for me?
