We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Do you also offer final cleaning of the old apartment in Solothurn?
faqs.answer: Yes, SwissCleanMove is your partner for the entire moving project. We also offer professional final cleaning in Solothurn with a 100% acceptance guarantee. Customers who bundle moving and cleaning with us benefit from a stress-free process. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Are you organizing the barrier for the moving wagon in Solothurn?
faqs.answer: If there is not enough parking space for our mobile van in front of your old or new place of residence (e.g. in the center of Solothurn or Olten), we can, after consultation, apply for an official parking ban from the municipality. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Can I buy or rent moving boxes from you?
faqs.answer: Yes, we will be happy to deliver high-quality packaging material such as sturdy moving boxes, clothing boxes (for hanging suits/dresses) and bubble wrap directly to Solothurn in advance of the move. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Do you also carry out removals on weekends?
faqs.answer: Yes, in order to offer you the greatest possible flexibility, our moving teams are also on duty for moves in the canton of Solothurn on Fridays and Saturdays upon prior arrangement. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: How big are the moving trucks used?
faqs.answer: We have a diverse, air-suspended fleet. We use maneuverable 3.5-ton transporters for old towns and neighborhoods as well as large 7.5-ton trucks for single-family homes and larger volumes. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: On what basis do you create the offers?
faqs.answer: The calculation at SwissCleanMove is always transparent and fair. We either work with fixed prices (e.g. for final cleaning or moving), with fixed hourly rates or prices per square meter. We always recommend a free on-site inspection in order to be able to provide you with an exact and binding offer that includes absolutely all costs.

faqs.question: Do you work with your own material?
faqs.answer: Yes, in the vast majority of cases we bring everything ourselves. For commercial cleaning, final cleaning and removals, our vehicles are fully equipped with professional vacuum cleaners, machines, cleaning agents, ladders and tools. We only use high-quality, material-friendly work equipment.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.answer: Thanks to our strong regional structure, we are extremely responsive. In emergencies, we can often mobilize a professional response team in the region within 24 to 48 hours. For work that can be planned, we recommend a lead time of one to two weeks.

faqs.question: What happens in the unlikely event of damage?
faqs.answer: Safety is our top priority. However, even with the greatest care, something can break. In this rare case, you as a customer are completely covered. We have extensive business and professional liability insurance that will ensure that any damage to your property is settled without any problems.

faqs.question: Do you use subcontractors for the work?
faqs.answer: No, not consciously. In order to maintain our high quality standards, we rely exclusively on our own, permanently employed staff. This guarantees quality and protects you as a customer from any liability risks associated with undeclared work or a lack of insurance.

faqs.question: Are your employees obliged to exercise discretion?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. This is particularly important in private households and offices. Each of our employees signs a strict confidentiality agreement. Data, files or private items are treated with absolute respect and discretion.

faqs.question: What types of cleaning products do you use?
faqs.answer: We focus on sustainability. We use professional, biodegradable and eco-certified Swiss cleaning products that effectively combat dirt and bacteria, but are gentle on surfaces and do not leave behind harmful fumes.

faqs.question: Can I flexibly reschedule an agreed appointment?
faqs.answer: We value flexibility. Appointments can be rescheduled in accordance with our general terms and conditions. If you are ill or on vacation, you can pause or postpone regular assignments in consultation with us without incurring additional costs.

faqs.question: How is payment made after deployment?
faqs.answer: Payment is easy. Once the service has been provided, you will receive a detailed invoice, which can be conveniently paid within 10 to 30 days. For regular services, we issue a clear collective invoice at the end of the month.

faqs.question: Do you offer a guarantee on the work carried out?
faqs.answer: Yes. For final cleaning after moving out, for example, we offer a 100% acceptance guarantee, which contractually obliges us to clean any defects free of charge by the administration. We also guarantee the highest quality for all other services.

faqs.question: Do I have to be present while the work is being carried out?
faqs.answer: This is not absolutely necessary. Many of our customers give us the key (often documented with a receipt) so that we can carry out the work while they are away. Of course you are also welcome to be on site.

faqs.question: Is it always the same person during regular missions?
faqs.answer: For recurring orders, we ensure that you are assigned a permanent team or a permanent reference person. We only organize professional representation in the event of vacation or illness.

Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Do I have to get the packaging material myself?

We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Are you organizing the barrier for the moving wagon in Neuchâtel?

sections.heading: Customer support and preparation tips (guide)
sections.body: In order to make your move in Friborg go smoothly, we recommend never packing moving boxes too heavily (maximum weight approx. 20 kg). Label the boxes with the target area not only on the lid, but also on the side. Clarify early on whether there is enough parking space for our moving van at the move-out and move-in location. If this is a problem on a narrow street in the city of Friborg or in Bulle, let us know in good time. We can organize an official parking ban with the relevant municipality. When moving between cantons, you should also remember to deregister from the old municipality in a timely manner and register at the new place of residence (usually required by law within 14 days). We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Environmental awareness and sustainability in every use
sections.body: As a modern Swiss company, we take responsibility for our environment. We have consistently aligned our processes with sustainability. We primarily use biodegradable and eco-certified cleaning products that are effective against dirt but do not harm the flora and fauna in Switzerland. We also precisely dose water and chemical consumption. This protects the environment and protects the valuable surfaces of your furniture and floors. When it comes to transport, we also pay attention to optimized route planning in order to keep CO2 emissions low.

sections.heading: Security, insurance and absolute transparency
sections.body: If you give us access to your home or business premises, trust is the most important asset. All of our employees go through a strict selection process before being hired permanently. We also have comprehensive business and professional liability insurance. If an item is damaged during our work, you are fully covered. We take responsibility – without discussions. This combination of careful personnel selection and strong insurance coverage gives our customers the reassuring feeling that they are in the best hands.

sections.heading: The advantages of our permanent staff
sections.body: In contrast to placement platforms that pass on orders to subcontractors, we are a real employer. This means constant quality for you. Our employees receive regular internal training on new technologies and safety regulations. You also benefit from often being able to greet the same familiar faces. You don’t have to worry about any administrative effort regarding AHV, SUVA or withholding tax – we take care of all of this. All you receive is a transparent invoice.

sections.heading: Stress-free packing and unpacking service
sections.body: We bring the necessary packing materials with us (moving boxes, clothing boxes) and pack your dishes, books and wardrobe in an absolutely unbreakable manner. At the new location in Basel, if requested, we will put everything back exactly into the cupboards. This service is extremely popular with busy professionals or expatriates who don't have time to spend weeks dealing with moving boxes. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Furniture lift use in tight spaces
sections.body: In Basel's old buildings (e.g. in Grossbasel or Kleinbasel) the stairwells are often extremely narrow and steep. This is where we use our furniture lift. It transports the heaviest sofas or pianos safely over the facade through the window directly into the transport trolley. This service protects the property's valuable staircase from scratches and the furniture from damage. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Proper disposal and clearance
sections.body: When moving, you often get rid of old furniture or defective electrical appliances. We take bulky items with us on moving day and dispose of them in an environmentally friendly manner at local recycling centers in the Basel area. This saves you time and the rental of an additional van to drive to the workshop yourself. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Why professional moving help in Basel makes the difference (guide)
sections.body: The municipal administration in Basel is demanding, and the heavy traffic in the city does not tolerate unprepared logistics. If you move with friends, you often risk fines due to incorrect parking (e.g. blocking the tram tracks) or damage to the rented vehicle. A professional moving company like SwissCleanMove organizes the necessary parking bans at the Allmendverwaltung Basel-Stadt in advance, brings the necessary know-how, rolling stands and, above all, comprehensive transport insurance. When moving privately, private liability insurance companies are often not liable for damage to the stairwell! We recommend that our customers always transport sensitive documents and valuables personally. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Our detailed work process and quality promise
sections.body: A professional result requires structured processes. At SwissCleanMove we leave nothing to chance. The first step is always a thorough needs analysis, often with a free on-site visit to the region. On this basis, we create a tailor-made specification in which all tasks are recorded in detail. On the day of execution, our team arrives on time with the most modern equipment and professional, material-friendly means. Our team leaders monitor the execution on site and guarantee that the specifications are carried out exactly. After completing the work, we carry out strict quality control. Only when we are 100% satisfied do we hand over the result to you.

sections.heading: Local expertise and quick availability
sections.body: Thanks to our strong presence in the region, we can offer our services not only with the highest quality, but also with remarkable speed. We are familiar with the local conditions. Especially in emergencies, be it an urgent move or a cleaning job, our team proves its strength. We are often able to be on site within 24 hours. We adapt to your schedule and also offer assignments on weekends or evenings so as not to disrupt your routine.

sections.heading: The advantages of our permanent staff
sections.body: In contrast to placement platforms that pass on orders to subcontractors, we are a real employer. This means constant quality for you. Our employees receive regular internal training on new technologies and safety regulations. You also benefit from often being able to greet the same familiar faces. You don’t have to worry about any administrative effort regarding AHV, SUVA or withholding tax – we take care of all of this. All you receive is a transparent invoice.

faqs.question: Do you carry out moves in Basel-Stadt and Basel-Landschaft?

These include the city of Basel, the Fricktal and surrounding communities such as Binningen, Allschwil, Riehen and Liestal. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

Whether you are moving from Basel to Zurich, Bern, Lucerne or Ticino - we carry out transports throughout Switzerland with the greatest reliability. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to move in Basel?
faqs.answer: We work with transparent flat-rate prices. The costs depend on the amount of furniture, the distance and any additional services. After a free viewing in Basel you will receive a binding fixed price offer. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Is my furniture insured during transport?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. At SwissCleanMove, every move is covered by comprehensive transport insurance as well as business liability insurance (for damage to the stairwell, for example). In the event of damage, we assume responsibility. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Do you organize parking bans in the city of Basel?
faqs.answer: Yes. Parking space in Basel is very limited. At your request, we will take care of registering a temporary parking permit with the Allmendverwaltung Basel and put up the necessary signs in front of your building in a timely manner. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Do you also offer removals in Basel on weekends?
faqs.answer: Yes, we also carry out removals on Friday or Saturday upon request, which is particularly advantageous for working people or companies. Weekend dates are very popular, which is why we recommend booking early. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Do you also dismantle complex cabinets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our moving helpers are equipped with the necessary tools and are very experienced in dismantling and rebuilding common cupboards, beds and shelving systems. We ensure that everything at your new place of residence in Basel is stable again. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Can I rent or buy moving boxes from you in Basel?
faqs.answer: Yes, we will be happy to deliver professional packaging material such as sturdy moving boxes, clothing boxes (for hanging transport) and bubble wrap directly to your home in advance of the move. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: Can I book the final cleaning of the old apartment at the same time?
faqs.answer: Of course. SwissCleanMove is a full-service agency. In addition to the move, we also offer professional final cleaning in Basel with a 100% acceptance guarantee. Customers who book both benefit from a combined price. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: How long does an average move in Basel take?
faqs.answer: Moving a standard 3.5-room apartment within the Basel region is usually completed within a day (usually by the early afternoon). In the case of intercantonal moves, the duration can extend to two days. We also assure you that our services in this region always meet the highest Swiss quality standards. Our customer service will be happy to assist you at any time if you have any further questions.

faqs.question: How do you calculate the cost of this service?
faqs.answer: The calculation at SwissCleanMove is always transparent and fair. We either work with fixed prices (e.g. for final cleaning or moving), with fixed hourly rates or prices per square meter. We always recommend a free on-site inspection in order to be able to provide you with an exact and binding offer that includes absolutely all costs.

faqs.question: Do you provide the cleaning supplies and equipment you need?
faqs.answer: Yes, in the vast majority of cases we bring everything ourselves. For commercial cleaning, final cleaning and removals, our vehicles are fully equipped with professional vacuum cleaners, machines, cleaning agents, ladders and tools. We only use high-quality, material-friendly work equipment.

faqs.question: How quickly can appointments be booked?
faqs.answer: Thanks to our strong regional structure, we are extremely responsive. In emergencies, we can often mobilize a professional response team in the region within 24 to 48 hours. For work that can be planned, we recommend a lead time of one to two weeks.

faqs.question: What happens in the unlikely event of damage?
faqs.answer: Safety is our top priority. However, even with the greatest care, something can break. In this rare case, you as a customer are completely covered. We have extensive business and professional liability insurance that will ensure that any damage to your property is settled without any problems.

faqs.question: Do you use subcontractors for the work?
faqs.answer: No, not consciously. In order to maintain our high quality standards, we rely exclusively on our own, permanently employed staff. This guarantees quality and protects you as a customer from any liability risks associated with undeclared work or a lack of insurance.

faqs.question: Are your employees obliged to exercise discretion?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. This is particularly important in private households and offices. Each of our employees signs a strict confidentiality agreement. Data, files or private items are treated with absolute respect and discretion.

faqs.question: What types of cleaning products do you use?
faqs.answer: We focus on sustainability. We use professional, biodegradable and eco-certified Swiss cleaning products that effectively combat dirt and bacteria, but are gentle on surfaces and do not leave behind harmful fumes.

faqs.question: Can I flexibly reschedule an agreed appointment?
faqs.answer: We value flexibility. Appointments can be rescheduled in accordance with our general terms and conditions. If you are ill or on vacation, you can pause or postpone regular assignments in consultation with us without incurring additional costs.

faqs.question: How is payment made after deployment?
faqs.answer: Payment is easy. Once the service has been provided, you will receive a detailed invoice, which can be conveniently paid within 10 to 30 days. For regular services, we issue a clear collective invoice at the end of the month.

faqs.question: Do you offer a guarantee on the work carried out?
faqs.answer: Yes. For final cleaning after moving out, for example, we offer a 100% acceptance guarantee, which contractually obliges us to clean any defects free of charge by the administration. We also guarantee the highest quality for all other services.

faqs.question: Do I have to be present while the work is being carried out?
faqs.answer: This is not absolutely necessary. Many of our customers give us the key (often documented with a receipt) so that we can carry out the work while they are away. Of course you are also welcome to be on site.

faqs.question: Is it always the same person during regular missions?
faqs.answer: For recurring orders, we ensure that you are assigned a permanent team or a permanent reference person. We only organize professional representation in the event of vacation or illness.

umzugSchweiz.h1: Moving company Switzerland – moving, cleaning & moving service
umzugSchweiz.heroSubtitle: Professional moves in Switzerland – carefully planned, efficiently carried out and fairly priced.
umzugSchweiz.intro: Welcome to SwissCleanMove. Switzerland is a dynamic country in which people often change their place of residence for professional, family or personal reasons. A move across Switzerland, across cantonal and language borders, requires a maximum of logistical planning and experience. SwissCleanMove is your reliable, national moving partner for the whole of Switzerland. We take all the logistical planning and heavy lifting off your hands, whether you're moving from Geneva to St. Gallen, from Basel to Lugano or from Zurich to Bern. We reliably support families, individuals, expatriates and companies at every step of their national move. We offer you absolute cost security through guaranteed flat-rate prices, regardless of the distance. Our offers always include professional rein helpers, modern, air-suspended long-distance transport vehicles and comprehensive, fully comprehensive transport insurance. No hidden costs, no unpleasant surprises. We work extremely quickly and professionally. Trust in real Swiss moving quality for your national moving project. Greetings from SwissCleanMove! As your local expert, we know exactly what is important. We deliberately avoid using subcontractors and instead rely on our own, excellently trained specialist staff. Enjoy absolute cost transparency and Swiss premium quality. Whether for private individuals or companies, we offer tailor-made solutions. Contact us for a free quote.

sections.heading: Your Swiss moving partner for national transports
sections.body: A national move in Switzerland brings with it special logistical challenges: long travel times, different traffic rules in urban centers, topographical hurdles over passes and different cantonal regulations for parking bans. We know the entire Swiss geography very well. We do not offer standard solutions, but rather advise you individually after a detailed telephone assessment or (regionally) through a free on-site inspection. You determine the scope of our work: from a comfortable complete move including packing and unpacking service to the safe long-distance transport of your furniture. Our primary goal is to ensure that your move throughout Switzerland is stress-free and free of damage. We ensure this through our permanently employed, multilingual and experienced employees. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Who we work for in Switzerland
sections.body: We are proud to serve a wide range of customers throughout Switzerland: families moving cantons for work reasons, seniors moving to the sunny south, and national and international companies requiring relocation services for their employees. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Careful national private removals
sections.body: We move all of your household goods safely from one end of Switzerland to the other. Our employees pack sensitive pieces of furniture (antiques, art) with stretch film and blankets and secure them professionally in our modern long-haul trucks. This service is aimed at all private individuals in Switzerland. Customers book us because we handle their personal memorabilia with extreme care and make moving day relaxing with perfect logistics. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Office, business and relocation moves
sections.body: We offer efficient relocation services for companies with branches throughout Switzerland. We transport heavy filing cabinets, servers and office furniture over long distances. In order not to disrupt operations, we also carry out company moves on weekends upon request. This service is perfect for large companies and SMEs. Business customers appreciate our adherence to deadlines and precise, nationwide planning. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Professional packing and unpacking service
sections.body: If you don't have the time to pack boxes, we'll do it for you. Our team brings professional packing materials and packs dishes, books and clothing so that they are unbreakable. At your destination, regardless of the canton, we will put everything back in your cupboards if you wish. This service is ideal for busy people and expatriates, as their personal relocation costs are reduced to almost zero. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Professional furniture assembly
sections.body: Large cupboards and beds often cannot be transported in one go. Our skilled moving helpers will dismantle your furniture at your old place of residence and reassemble it in an absolutely stable manner at the new location, hundreds of kilometers away. We bring all the tools with us. This service is aimed at customers who want to avoid the hassle of dealing with instructions. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Use of furniture lifts nationwide
sections.body: In old buildings (such as in the cities of Geneva, Basel or Zurich) with narrow stairwells, we use our furniture lift to safely transport the heaviest sofas or pianos over the facade. This service protects the staircase from scratches and the furniture from damage and greatly speeds up transport in urban areas. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Disposal and clearance
sections.body: Moving is the ideal opportunity to get rid of old things. We take defective devices or unwanted furniture with us directly at the point of departure and dispose of them professionally before we start the long journey to the new canton. This saves volume and costs. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Moving guide for Switzerland: Intercantonal particularities
sections.body: Moving across cantonal borders requires administrative care. You must deregister at your old place of residence (local administration) and register at your new place of residence within the statutory deadline (usually 14 days). Remember that taxes in Switzerland vary from canton to canton and changing cantons during the year can have tax implications. Report your change of address to the road traffic office in good time so that you can change your vehicle registration documents and number plates if necessary. We also advise our customers to always transport valuables, passports and important documents in their own vehicle when moving long distances. As far as logistics are concerned: Leave the application for parking bans in large cities (such as Zurich, Geneva or Bern) to us. The cantonal regulations are very different and we have the necessary experience with the respective police authorities. We attach great importance to ensuring that this work is carried out in accordance with the highest Swiss industry standards. Our many years of experience in this region show that detailed preliminary planning and the use of trained specialist personnel are the key to success. We always pay attention to an environmentally friendly way of working and the protection of your real estate and furniture. We guarantee you absolute transparency and smooth execution that you can rely on 100%.

sections.heading: Environmental awareness and sustainability in every use
sections.body: As a modern Swiss company, we take responsibility for our environment. We have consistently aligned our processes with sustainability. We primarily use biodegradable and eco-certified cleaning products that are effective against dirt but do not harm the flora and fauna in Switzerland. We also precisely dose water and chemical consumption. This protects the environment and protects the valuable surfaces of your furniture and floors. When it comes to transport, we also pay attention to optimized route planning in order to keep CO2 emissions low.

sections.heading: Security, insurance and absolute transparency
sections.body: If you give us access to your home or business premises, trust is the most important asset. All of our employees go through a strict selection process before being hired permanently. We also have comprehensive business and professional liability insurance. If an item is damaged during our work, you are fully covered. We take responsibility – without discussions. This combination of careful personnel selection and strong insurance coverage gives our customers the reassuring feeling that they are in the best hands.

sections.heading: The advantages of our permanent staff
sections.body: In contrast to placement platforms that pass on orders to subcontractors, we are a real employer. This means constant quality for you. Our employees receive regular internal training on new technologies and safety regulations. You also benefit from often being able to greet the same familiar faces. You don’t have to worry about any administrative effort regarding AHV, SUVA or withholding tax – we take care of all of this. All you receive is a transparent invoice.

That's why at SwissCleanMove we don't rely on anonymous subcontractors, but rather on our own, permanently employed and highly trained staff. This not only guarantees fair working conditions, but also consistently high quality for you as a customer in Biel, Nidau, Lyss, Brügg, Ipsach, Aarberg, and Pieterlen. Whether you are a private individual looking for discreet domestic help, a company that needs regular office cleaning, or a property management company that requires a competent caretaker service - we cover the entire spectrum. Our philosophy is based on customer proximity, proactive communication and the use of the most modern tools. With our extensive experience and countless successfully completed orders in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand, we know exactly what is important. With over 500 households in the Biel area regularly looked after, we are the market leader for private household services. We attach great importance to sustainability and use environmentally friendly, biodegradable cleaning products wherever possible. On this page, discover everything you need to know about our services, how our process works and why so many satisfied customers in the region choose us. Do not hesitate to contact us for a free, non-binding viewing or quote.

sections.heading: Why private household help in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand?
sections.body: Choosing the right service provider for private household help is crucial to your satisfaction. There are many providers in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland, but SwissCleanMove stands out with its uncompromising focus on Swiss quality standards. We know exactly the specific requirements of customers in Biel, Nidau, Lyss, Brügg, Ipsach, Aarberg, and Pieterlen. Our staff is locally anchored, which enables short travel distances, fast response times and a high level of flexibility. Washing, ironing, vacuuming and wiping become a minor matter while you concentrate on what really matters. Another important aspect is our absolute transparency. With us there are no hidden costs, no unclear hourly surcharges and no unpleasant surprises on the invoice. We provide you with detailed, fair offers that we strictly adhere to. In addition, all of our employees are comprehensively insured (company liability, accident), so that you as the client are always on the safe side. We take care of the entire administrative process, which means maximum relief for you. Sit back and let the professionals do the hard work.

sections.heading: Our detailed work process
sections.body: A professional result with private household help requires structured processes. At SwissCleanMove we leave nothing to chance. The first step is always a thorough needs analysis. We often carry out a free on-site visit in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland in order to record the exact conditions. We analyze what floor coverings you have, what cleaners are allowed and whether you have pets. Based on this inspection, we create a tailor-made specification in which all tasks and intervals are recorded in detail. On the day of execution, our team arrives on time with the latest equipment and professional, material-friendly cleaning products or tools. Our team leaders monitor the execution on site and guarantee that the specifications are processed point by point. After completing the work, we carry out strict quality control. Only when we are 100% satisfied do we hand over the result to you. This structured process is the secret of our long-standing success and high customer satisfaction in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand.

sections.heading: Local expertise and quick availability
sections.body: Thanks to our strong presence in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand, we can offer services for private household help not only of the highest quality, but also with remarkable speed. We are familiar with the special features of the region, from the narrow streets in the old town to large commercial parks. We also travel daily to outlying areas such as Leubring, Evilard or the lakeside communities. Especially in emergencies, be it a cleaning appointment that has been canceled at short notice, an urgent move or water damage that requires immediate cleaning, our on-call service proves its strength. We are often able to have a competent team on site in Biel, Nidau, Lyss, Brügg, Ipsach, Aarberg, and Pieterlen within 24 hours. We adapt to your schedule and also offer assignments on weekends, in the evenings or in the early hours of the morning so as not to disrupt your private or business activities.

sections.heading: Environmental awareness and sustainability
sections.body: As a modern Swiss company, we take responsibility for our environment. This is particularly true in the area of ​​cleaning. We have consistently aligned our processes for private household help towards sustainability in recent years. A healthy indoor climate is important for private households. We avoid aggressive fumes. We primarily use biodegradable and eco-certified cleaning products that are effective against dirt but do not harm the flora and fauna around Lake Biel and Switzerland. We also use modern microfiber systems and special dosing systems to precisely dose water and chemical consumption. This not only protects the environment, but also protects the valuable surfaces of your furniture, floors and real estate. When it comes to moving and transport, we also pay attention to optimized route planning in order to keep the CO2 emissions of our modern vehicle fleet as low as possible.

sections.heading: Security, insurance and trust
sections.body: If you allow strangers access to your home or business premises in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland, trust is the most important asset. SwissCleanMove is aware of this responsibility. All of our employees who work in the area of ​​private household help go through a strict selection process before being hired permanently, including a check of the debt collection and criminal records. Every cleaning fairy is personally trained by us. We also have comprehensive business and professional liability insurance. If a scratch occurs in the parquet or an object is damaged during our work, you are fully covered. We take responsibility – without discussions. This combination of careful personnel selection and strong insurance coverage gives our customers throughout Switzerland the reassuring feeling that they are in the best hands.

sections.heading: The advantages of a permanent position
sections.body: In contrast to many placement platforms that simply pass on orders to freelancers or subcontractors, we are a real employer. What does this mean for you when booking private household help? It means consistent quality. Our employees identify with SwissCleanMove. You receive regular internal training on new cleaning techniques, workplace ergonomics and safety regulations. You have a permanent contact person who knows your household inside and out. You also benefit from the fact that you can often greet the same familiar faces, which is particularly important for regular cleaning or house maintenance. You don’t have to worry about any administrative effort regarding AHV, SUVA or withholding tax – we take care of all of this. All you receive is a transparent, monthly invoice.

sections.heading: Tailor-made solutions for private and commercial use
sections.body: Every customer has different needs. A private household in Biel requires a different approach than an open-plan office in Bern or a branch in Zurich. In the area of ​​private household help, we therefore do not offer rigid packages, but rather completely flexible, modular solutions. From weekly basic cleaning to daily full service including shopping – everything is possible. Private customers value our discretion and the opportunity to include special requests such as ironing laundry or cleaning cellar compartments in the contract. Commercial customers, in turn, benefit from our SLA (Service Level Agreements), fixed contact persons and the ability to schedule cleaning times so that business operations are not disrupted in any way. We scale our services with your business: as you grow, our cleaning team simply grows with you.

We often carry out a free on-site visit in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland in order to record the exact conditions. The planning begins with a volume calculation and obtaining parking permits in the city of Biel. Based on this inspection, we create a tailor-made specification in which all tasks and intervals are recorded in detail. On the day of execution, our team arrives on time with the latest equipment and professional, material-friendly cleaning products or tools. Our team leaders monitor the execution on site and guarantee that the specifications are processed point by point. After completing the work, we carry out strict quality control. Only when we are 100% satisfied do we hand over the result to you. This structured process is the secret of our long-standing success and high customer satisfaction in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand.

sections.heading: Local expertise and quick availability
sections.body: Thanks to our strong presence in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand, we can offer services for stress-free moves not only of the highest quality, but also with remarkable speed. We are familiar with the special features of the region, from the narrow streets in the old town to large commercial parks. Our drivers can navigate the narrow streets of Biel's old town or houses on the slopes of the Jura effortlessly thanks to state-of-the-art furniture lifts. Especially in emergencies, be it a cleaning appointment that has been canceled at short notice, an urgent move or water damage that requires immediate cleaning, our on-call service proves its strength. We are often able to have a competent team on site in Biel, Nidau, Lyss, Brügg, Ipsach, Aarberg, and Pieterlen within 24 hours. We adapt to your schedule and also offer assignments on weekends, in the evenings or in the early hours of the morning so as not to disrupt your private or business activities.

sections.heading: Environmental awareness and sustainability
sections.body: As a modern Swiss company, we take responsibility for our environment. This is particularly true in the area of ​​cleaning. In recent years, we have consistently aligned our processes for stress-free moves with sustainability. We use reusable moving boxes and environmentally friendly wrapping paper instead of plastic film. We primarily use biodegradable and eco-certified cleaning products that are effective against dirt but do not harm the flora and fauna around Lake Biel and Switzerland. We also use modern microfiber systems and special dosing systems to precisely dose water and chemical consumption. This not only protects the environment, but also protects the valuable surfaces of your furniture, floors and real estate. When it comes to moving and transport, we also pay attention to optimized route planning in order to keep the CO2 emissions of our modern vehicle fleet as low as possible.

sections.heading: Security, insurance and trust
sections.body: If you allow strangers access to your home or business premises in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland, trust is the most important asset. SwissCleanMove is aware of this responsibility. All of our employees who are employed in the area of ​​stress-free removals go through a strict selection process, including checking their debt collection and criminal records, before being hired permanently. Transport insurance is mandatory for all of our moves and included in the price. We also have comprehensive business and professional liability insurance. If a scratch occurs in the parquet or an object is damaged during our work, you are fully covered. We take responsibility – without discussions. This combination of careful personnel selection and strong insurance coverage gives our customers throughout Switzerland the reassuring feeling that they are in the best hands.

sections.heading: The advantages of a permanent position
sections.body: In contrast to many placement platforms that simply pass on orders to freelancers or subcontractors, we are a real employer. What does this mean for you when booking stress-free removals? It means consistent quality. Our employees identify with SwissCleanMove. You receive regular internal training on new cleaning techniques, workplace ergonomics and safety regulations. Our skilled employees also take on the complex assembly of cupboards and beds. You also benefit from the fact that you can often greet the same familiar faces, which is particularly important for regular cleaning or house maintenance. You don’t have to worry about any administrative effort regarding AHV, SUVA or withholding tax – we take care of all of this. All you receive is a transparent, monthly invoice.

sections.heading: Tailor-made solutions for private and commercial use
sections.body: Every customer has different needs. A private household in Biel requires a different approach than an open-plan office in Bern or a branch in Zurich. When it comes to stress-free moves, we don't offer rigid packages, but rather completely flexible, modular solutions. We also offer special relocation services for expats and managers moving to Biel. Private customers value our discretion and the opportunity to include special requests such as ironing laundry or cleaning cellar compartments in the contract. Commercial customers, in turn, benefit from our SLA (Service Level Agreements), fixed contact persons and the ability to schedule cleaning times so that business operations are not disrupted in any way. We scale our services with your business: as you grow, our cleaning team simply grows with you.

faqs.question: How exactly is the price for stress-free moves calculated?
faqs.answer: The calculation at SwissCleanMove is always transparent and fair. Depending on the specific service, we either work with fixed prices (e.g. final cleaning from CHF 350 or removals from CHF 490), with fixed hourly rates (e.g. household help from CHF 35/h) or prices per square meter. We always recommend a free on-site inspection in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland in order to be able to provide you with an exact and binding offer in which all costs are included.

faqs.question: Do you work with your own equipment for stress-free moves?
faqs.answer: In the vast majority of cases we bring everything ourselves. For commercial cleaning, construction cleaning, final cleaning and removals, our vehicles are fully equipped with professional vacuum cleaners, single-disc machines, cleaning products, ladders and tools. Only for private household helpers do we sometimes use their preferred devices on site at the customer's request.

faqs.question: How quickly can you be there in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand?
faqs.answer: Thanks to our strong regional structure, we are extremely responsive. In emergencies, such as the absence of a cleaner or after water damage, we can often mobilize a professional emergency team in the region within 24 to 48 hours. For work that can be planned, we recommend a lead time of 1-2 weeks.

faqs.question: What happens if something is damaged during work?
faqs.answer: Safety is our top priority. However, even with the greatest care, something can break. In this rare case, you as a customer are completely covered. We have very extensive business and professional liability insurance, which covers damage to your property in Switzerland without any problems.

faqs.question: Do you use subcontractors or freelancers?
faqs.answer: No, not consciously. In order to maintain our high quality standards and ensure stress-free moves, we rely exclusively on our own, permanently employed staff. This not only guarantees quality, but also protects you as a customer from any liability risks associated with undeclared work or a lack of insurance.

faqs.question: Are your employees trained in the areas of discretion and data protection?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. This is particularly important when cleaning offices and in private households. Each of our employees signs a strict confidentiality agreement. Data, files or private items are treated with absolute respect and discretion.

faqs.question: What cleaning products do you use?
faqs.answer: We focus on sustainability and material conservation. We use professional, biodegradable and eco-certified Swiss cleaning products that effectively combat dirt and bacteria, but are gentle on the surfaces of your property (such as real wood parquet or natural stone) and do not leave behind any toxic fumes.

faqs.question: Can I flexibly postpone or cancel the date for stress-free moves?
faqs.answer: We value flexibility. Appointments can be rescheduled in accordance with our general terms and conditions. If you are ill or on vacation, you can pause or postpone maintenance cleaning operations in consultation with us without incurring any additional costs.

faqs.question: How are the services paid for?
faqs.answer: Payment is easy. After final cleaning or removals have been provided, you will receive a detailed invoice (payable within 10-30 days). For regular services such as office cleaning or house maintenance, we issue a clear collective invoice at the end of the month.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees on your work?
faqs.answer: Yes. For final cleaning after moving out, we provide a 100% acceptance guarantee, which contractually obliges us to clean up free of charge if there are any defects by the administration. For all other services, we also guarantee that the agreed specifications will be implemented error-free.

faqs.question: Do I have to be on site in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland during the work?
faqs.answer: This is not absolutely necessary. Many of our customers give us the key (often documented with a key receipt) so that we can carry out the work while they are away (or outside of office hours). Of course you are also welcome to be present.

faqs.question: Is it always the same person who comes to me?
faqs.answer: For recurring orders (such as household help, house maintenance or maintenance cleaning) we ensure that you are assigned a permanent team or a permanent reference person. Only in the event of vacation or illness do we organize a replacement who knows immediately what needs to be done thanks to the detailed specifications.

faqs.question: How exactly is the price for streak-free window cleaning calculated?
faqs.answer: The calculation at SwissCleanMove is always transparent and fair. Depending on the specific service, we either work with fixed prices (e.g. final cleaning from CHF 350 or removals from CHF 490), with fixed hourly rates (e.g. household help from CHF 35/h) or prices per square meter. We always recommend a free on-site inspection in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland in order to be able to provide you with an exact and binding offer in which all costs are included.

faqs.question: Do you use your own equipment for streak-free window cleaning?
faqs.answer: In the vast majority of cases we bring everything ourselves. For commercial cleaning, construction cleaning, final cleaning and removals, our vehicles are fully equipped with professional vacuum cleaners, single-disc machines, cleaning products, ladders and tools. Only for private household helpers do we sometimes use their preferred devices on site at the customer's request.

faqs.question: How quickly can you be there in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand?
faqs.answer: Thanks to our strong regional structure, we are extremely responsive. In emergencies, such as the absence of a cleaner or after water damage, we can often mobilize a professional emergency team in the region within 24 to 48 hours. For work that can be planned, we recommend a lead time of 1-2 weeks.

faqs.question: What happens if something is damaged during work?
faqs.answer: Safety is our top priority. However, even with the greatest care, something can break. In this rare case, you as a customer are completely covered. We have very extensive business and professional liability insurance, which covers damage to your property in Switzerland without any problems.

faqs.question: Do you use subcontractors or freelancers?
faqs.answer: No, not consciously. In order to maintain our high quality standards for streak-free window cleaning, we rely exclusively on our own, permanently employed staff. This not only guarantees quality, but also protects you as a customer from any liability risks associated with undeclared work or a lack of insurance.

faqs.question: Are your employees trained in the areas of discretion and data protection?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. This is particularly important when cleaning offices and in private households. Each of our employees signs a strict confidentiality agreement. Data, files or private items are treated with absolute respect and discretion.

faqs.question: What cleaning products do you use?
faqs.answer: We focus on sustainability and material conservation. We use professional, biodegradable and eco-certified Swiss cleaning products that effectively combat dirt and bacteria, but are gentle on the surfaces of your property (such as real wood parquet or natural stone) and do not leave behind any toxic fumes.

faqs.question: Can I flexibly postpone or cancel the appointment for streak-free window cleaning?
faqs.answer: We value flexibility. Appointments can be rescheduled in accordance with our general terms and conditions. If you are ill or on vacation, you can pause or postpone maintenance cleaning operations in consultation with us without incurring any additional costs.

faqs.question: How are the services paid for?
faqs.answer: Payment is easy. After final cleaning or removals have been provided, you will receive a detailed invoice (payable within 10-30 days). For regular services such as office cleaning or house maintenance, we issue a clear collective invoice at the end of the month.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees on your work?
faqs.answer: Yes. For final cleaning after moving out, we provide a 100% acceptance guarantee, which contractually obliges us to clean up free of charge if there are any defects by the administration. For all other services, we also guarantee that the agreed specifications will be implemented error-free.

faqs.question: Do I have to be on site in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland during the work?
faqs.answer: This is not absolutely necessary. Many of our customers give us the key (often documented with a key receipt) so that we can carry out the work while they are away (or outside of office hours). Of course you are also welcome to be present.

faqs.question: Is it always the same person who comes to me?
faqs.answer: For recurring orders (such as household help, house maintenance or maintenance cleaning) we ensure that you are assigned a permanent team or a permanent reference person. Only in the event of vacation or illness do we organize a replacement who knows immediately what needs to be done thanks to the detailed specifications.

transportfirmaBiel.intro: Welcome to SwissCleanMove, your leading expert for safe transport and courier services in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand. If you are looking for the highest quality, Swiss reliability and absolutely transparent prices, then you have found the right partner. When it comes to the safe transport of your valuable goods, you cannot make any compromises. We understand that cleaning, moving and facility management services are an absolute matter of trust. That's why at SwissCleanMove we don't rely on anonymous subcontractors, but rather on our own, permanently employed and highly trained staff. This not only guarantees fair working conditions, but also consistently high quality for you as a customer in Biel, Nidau, Lyss, Brügg, Ipsach, Aarberg, and Pieterlen. Whether you are a private individual looking for discreet domestic help, a company that needs regular office cleaning, or a property management company that requires a competent caretaker service - we cover the entire spectrum. Our philosophy is based on customer proximity, proactive communication and the use of the most modern tools. With our extensive experience and countless successfully completed orders in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand, we know exactly what is important. We deliver packages, pallets and sensitive pieces of furniture on time for our Biel customers every day. We attach great importance to sustainability and use environmentally friendly, biodegradable cleaning products wherever possible. On this page, discover everything you need to know about our services, how our process works and why so many satisfied customers in the region choose us. Do not hesitate to contact us for a free, non-binding viewing or quote.

sections.heading: Why secure transport and courier services in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand?
sections.body: Choosing the right service provider for secure transport and courier services is crucial to your satisfaction. There are many providers in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland, but SwissCleanMove stands out with its uncompromising focus on Swiss quality standards. We know exactly the specific requirements of customers in Biel, Nidau, Lyss, Brügg, Ipsach, Aarberg, and Pieterlen. Our staff is locally anchored, which enables short travel distances, fast response times and a high level of flexibility. Every transporter who drives with us is a trained logistics professional. Another important aspect is our absolute transparency. With us there are no hidden costs, no unclear hourly surcharges and no unpleasant surprises on the invoice. We provide you with detailed, fair offers that we strictly adhere to. In addition, all of our employees are comprehensively insured (company liability, accident), so that you as the client are always on the safe side. We take care of the entire administrative process, which means maximum relief for you. Sit back and let the professionals do the hard work.

sections.heading: Our detailed work process
sections.body: A professional result in secure transport and courier services requires structured processes. At SwissCleanMove we leave nothing to chance. The first step is always a thorough needs analysis. We often carry out a free on-site visit in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland in order to record the exact conditions. We check the resilience of the soil at the destination and plan transport routes to avoid Biel's traffic chaos. Based on this inspection, we create a tailor-made specification in which all tasks and intervals are recorded in detail. On the day of execution, our team arrives on time with the latest equipment and professional, material-friendly cleaning products or tools. Our team leaders monitor the execution on site and guarantee that the specifications are processed point by point. After completing the work, we carry out strict quality control. Only when we are 100% satisfied do we hand over the result to you. This structured process is the secret of our long-standing success and high customer satisfaction in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand.

sections.heading: Local expertise and quick availability
sections.body: Thanks to our strong presence in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand, we can offer secure transport and courier services not only of the highest quality, but also with remarkable speed. We are familiar with the special features of the region, from the narrow streets in the old town to large commercial parks. We also carry out transports to the neighboring Jura mountains smoothly using special vehicles. Especially in emergencies, be it a cleaning appointment that has been canceled at short notice, an urgent move or water damage that requires immediate cleaning, our on-call service proves its strength. We are often able to have a competent team on site in Biel, Nidau, Lyss, Brügg, Ipsach, Aarberg, and Pieterlen within 24 hours. We adapt to your schedule and also offer assignments on weekends, in the evenings or in the early hours of the morning so as not to disrupt your private or business activities.

sections.heading: Environmental awareness and sustainability
sections.body: As a modern Swiss company, we take responsibility for our environment. This is particularly true in the area of ​​cleaning. We have consistently aligned our processes for safe transport and courier services towards sustainability in recent years. Our transport vehicles meet the strictest Euro 6 emissions standards. We primarily use biodegradable and eco-certified cleaning products that are effective against dirt but do not harm the flora and fauna around Lake Biel and Switzerland. We also use modern microfiber systems and special dosing systems to precisely dose water and chemical consumption. This not only protects the environment, but also protects the valuable surfaces of your furniture, floors and real estate. When it comes to moving and transport, we also pay attention to optimized route planning in order to keep the CO2 emissions of our modern vehicle fleet as low as possible.

sections.heading: Security, insurance and trust
sections.body: If you allow strangers access to your home or business premises in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland, trust is the most important asset. SwissCleanMove is aware of this responsibility. All of our employees who work in the area of ​​secure transport and courier services go through a strict selection process, including checking their debt collection and criminal records, before being hired permanently. Your goods are fully insured with us from the moment you load them until they are handed over. We also have comprehensive business and professional liability insurance. If a scratch occurs in the parquet or an object is damaged during our work, you are fully covered. We take responsibility – without discussions. This combination of careful personnel selection and strong insurance coverage gives our customers throughout Switzerland the reassuring feeling that they are in the best hands.

sections.heading: The advantages of a permanent position
sections.body: In contrast to many placement platforms that simply pass on orders to freelancers or subcontractors, we are a real employer. What does this mean for you when booking secure transport and courier services? It means consistent quality. Our employees identify with SwissCleanMove. You receive regular internal training on new cleaning techniques, workplace ergonomics and safety regulations. We guarantee that the person who unloads your sofa in Biel will also unload it in Zurich. You also benefit from the fact that you can often greet the same familiar faces, which is particularly important for regular cleaning or house maintenance. You don’t have to worry about any administrative effort regarding AHV, SUVA or withholding tax – we take care of all of this. All you receive is a transparent, monthly invoice.

sections.heading: Tailor-made solutions for private and commercial use
sections.body: Every customer has different needs. A private household in Biel requires a different approach than an open-plan office in Bern or a branch in Zurich. In the area of ​​secure transport and courier services, we therefore do not offer rigid packages, but rather completely flexible, modular solutions. From the individual transport of an antique cupboard to the daily courier service for your SME. Private customers value our discretion and the opportunity to include special requests such as ironing laundry or cleaning cellar compartments in the contract. Commercial customers, in turn, benefit from our SLA (Service Level Agreements), fixed contact persons and the ability to schedule cleaning times so that business operations are not disrupted in any way. We scale our services with your business: as you grow, our cleaning team simply grows with you.

sections.heading: Why comprehensive facility management in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand?
sections.body: Choosing the right service provider for comprehensive facility management is crucial to your satisfaction. There are many providers in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland, but SwissCleanMove stands out with its uncompromising focus on Swiss quality standards. We know exactly the specific requirements of customers in Biel, Nidau, Lyss, Brügg, Ipsach, Aarberg, and Pieterlen. Our staff is locally anchored, which enables short travel distances, fast response times and a high level of flexibility. You save a huge amount of time and administration if you get cleaning, technology and gardening from a single source. Another important aspect is our absolute transparency. With us there are no hidden costs, no unclear hourly surcharges and no unpleasant surprises on the invoice. We provide you with detailed, fair offers that we strictly adhere to. In addition, all of our employees are comprehensively insured (company liability, accident), so that you as the client are always on the safe side. We take care of the entire administrative process, which means maximum relief for you. Sit back and let the professionals do the hard work.

sections.heading: Our detailed work process
sections.body: A professional result in comprehensive facility management requires structured processes. At SwissCleanMove we leave nothing to chance. The first step is always a thorough needs analysis. We often carry out a free on-site visit in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland in order to record the exact conditions. Together with the administration, we develop detailed service level agreements and checklists. Based on this inspection, we create a tailor-made specification in which all tasks and intervals are recorded in detail. On the day of execution, our team arrives on time with the latest equipment and professional, material-friendly cleaning products or tools. Our team leaders monitor the execution on site and guarantee that the specifications are processed point by point. After completing the work, we carry out strict quality control. Only when we are 100% satisfied do we hand over the result to you. This structured process is the secret of our long-standing success and high customer satisfaction in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand.

sections.heading: Local expertise and quick availability
sections.body: Thanks to our strong presence in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand, we can offer services for comprehensive facility management not only of the highest quality, but also with remarkable speed. We are familiar with the special features of the region, from the narrow streets in the old town to large commercial parks. Since our technicians are stationed in Biel, they can be on site within a short time in the event of lift malfunctions or heating failures. Especially in emergencies, be it a cleaning appointment that has been canceled at short notice, an urgent move or water damage that requires immediate cleaning, our on-call service proves its strength. We are often able to have a competent team on site in Biel, Nidau, Lyss, Brügg, Ipsach, Aarberg, and Pieterlen within 24 hours. We adapt to your schedule and also offer assignments on weekends, in the evenings or in the early hours of the morning so as not to disrupt your private or business activities.

sections.heading: Environmental awareness and sustainability
sections.body: As a modern Swiss company, we take responsibility for our environment. This is particularly true in the area of ​​cleaning. We have consistently aligned our processes for comprehensive facility management with sustainability in recent years. When carrying out winter maintenance on your forecourts, we use environmentally friendly road salt to protect the groundwater. We primarily use biodegradable and eco-certified cleaning products that are effective against dirt but do not harm the flora and fauna around Lake Biel and Switzerland. We also use modern microfiber systems and special dosing systems to precisely dose water and chemical consumption. This not only protects the environment, but also protects the valuable surfaces of your furniture, floors and real estate. When it comes to moving and transport, we also pay attention to optimized route planning in order to keep the CO2 emissions of our modern vehicle fleet as low as possible.

sections.heading: Security, insurance and trust
sections.body: If you allow strangers access to your home or business premises in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland, trust is the most important asset. SwissCleanMove is aware of this responsibility. All of our employees who work in the area of ​​comprehensive facility management go through a strict selection process, including checking their debt collection and criminal records, before being hired permanently. We take over the communication with the tenants, which significantly relieves the burden on property management. We also have comprehensive business and professional liability insurance. If a scratch occurs in the parquet or an object is damaged during our work, you are fully covered. We take responsibility – without discussions. This combination of careful personnel selection and strong insurance coverage gives our customers throughout Switzerland the reassuring feeling that they are in the best hands.

sections.heading: The advantages of a permanent position
sections.body: In contrast to many placement platforms that simply pass on orders to freelancers or subcontractors, we are a real employer. What does this mean for you when booking Comprehensive Facility Management? It means consistent quality. Our employees identify with SwissCleanMove. You receive regular internal training on new cleaning techniques, workplace ergonomics and safety regulations. The complete digital documentation of our tours gives you full control and transparency. You also benefit from the fact that you can often greet the same familiar faces, which is particularly important for regular cleaning or house maintenance. You don’t have to worry about any administrative effort regarding AHV, SUVA or withholding tax – we take care of all of this. All you receive is a transparent, monthly invoice.

sections.heading: Tailor-made solutions for private and commercial use
sections.body: Every customer has different needs. A private household in Biel requires a different approach than an open-plan office in Bern or a branch in Zurich. In the area of ​​comprehensive facility management, we therefore do not offer rigid packages, but rather completely flexible, modular solutions. From pure stairwell cleaning to 24/7 on-call service – you choose the modules you need. Private customers value our discretion and the opportunity to include special requests such as ironing laundry or cleaning cellar compartments in the contract. Commercial customers, in turn, benefit from our SLA (Service Level Agreements), fixed contact persons and the ability to schedule cleaning times so that business operations are not disrupted in any way. We scale our services with your business: as you grow, our cleaning team simply grows with you.
