faqs.question: How exactly is the price for Comprehensive Facility Management calculated?
faqs.answer: The calculation at SwissCleanMove is always transparent and fair. Depending on the specific service, we either work with fixed prices (e.g. final cleaning from CHF 350 or removals from CHF 490), with fixed hourly rates (e.g. household help from CHF 35/h) or prices per square meter. We always recommend a free on-site inspection in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland in order to be able to provide you with an exact and binding offer in which all costs are included.

faqs.question: Do you work with your own equipment at Comprehensive Facility Management?
faqs.answer: In the vast majority of cases we bring everything ourselves. For commercial cleaning, construction cleaning, final cleaning and removals, our vehicles are fully equipped with professional vacuum cleaners, single-disc machines, cleaning products, ladders and tools. Only for private household helpers do we sometimes use their preferred devices on site at the customer's request.

faqs.question: How quickly can you be there in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand?
faqs.answer: Thanks to our strong regional structure, we are extremely responsive. In emergencies, such as the absence of a cleaner or after water damage, we can often mobilize a professional emergency team in the region within 24 to 48 hours. For work that can be planned, we recommend a lead time of 1-2 weeks.

faqs.question: What happens if something is damaged during work?
faqs.answer: Safety is our top priority. However, even with the greatest care, something can break. In this rare case, you as a customer are completely covered. We have very extensive business and professional liability insurance, which covers damage to your property in Switzerland without any problems.

faqs.question: Do you use subcontractors or freelancers?
faqs.answer: No, not consciously. In order to maintain our high quality standards in comprehensive facility management, we rely exclusively on our own, permanently employed staff. This not only guarantees quality, but also protects you as a customer from any liability risks associated with undeclared work or a lack of insurance.

faqs.question: Are your employees trained in the areas of discretion and data protection?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. This is particularly important when cleaning offices and in private households. Each of our employees signs a strict confidentiality agreement. Data, files or private items are treated with absolute respect and discretion.

faqs.question: What cleaning products do you use?
faqs.answer: We focus on sustainability and material conservation. We use professional, biodegradable and eco-certified Swiss cleaning products that effectively combat dirt and bacteria, but are gentle on the surfaces of your property (such as real wood parquet or natural stone) and do not leave behind any toxic fumes.

faqs.question: Can I flexibly postpone or cancel the appointment for Comprehensive Facility Management?
faqs.answer: We value flexibility. Appointments can be rescheduled in accordance with our general terms and conditions. If you are ill or on vacation, you can pause or postpone maintenance cleaning operations in consultation with us without incurring any additional costs.

faqs.question: How are the services paid for?
faqs.answer: Payment is easy. After final cleaning or removals have been provided, you will receive a detailed invoice (payable within 10-30 days). For regular services such as office cleaning or house maintenance, we issue a clear collective invoice at the end of the month.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees on your work?
faqs.answer: Yes. For final cleaning after moving out, we provide a 100% acceptance guarantee, which contractually obliges us to clean up free of charge if there are any defects by the administration. For all other services, we also guarantee that the agreed specifications will be implemented error-free.

faqs.question: Do I have to be on site in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland during the work?
faqs.answer: This is not absolutely necessary. Many of our customers give us the key (often documented with a key receipt) so that we can carry out the work while they are away (or outside of office hours). Of course you are also welcome to be present.

faqs.question: Is it always the same person who comes to me?
faqs.answer: For recurring orders (such as household help, house maintenance or maintenance cleaning) we ensure that you are assigned a permanent team or a permanent reference person. Only in the event of vacation or illness do we organize a replacement who knows immediately what needs to be done thanks to the detailed specifications.

sections.heading: The advantages of a permanent position
sections.body: In contrast to many placement platforms that simply pass on orders to freelancers or subcontractors, we are a real employer. What does this mean for you when booking rough construction cleaning and fine cleaning? It means consistent quality. Our employees identify with SwissCleanMove. You receive regular internal training on new cleaning techniques, workplace ergonomics and safety regulations. We use special class H vacuum cleaners to filter harmful fine dust from the air we breathe. You also benefit from the fact that you can often greet the same familiar faces, which is particularly important for regular cleaning or house maintenance. You don’t have to worry about any administrative effort regarding AHV, SUVA or withholding tax – we take care of all of this. All you receive is a transparent, monthly invoice.

sections.heading: Tailor-made solutions for private and commercial use
sections.body: Every customer has different needs. A private household in Biel requires a different approach than an open-plan office in Bern or a branch in Zurich. In the area of ​​rough construction cleaning and fine cleaning, we therefore do not offer rigid packages, but rather completely flexible, modular solutions. Used for private bathroom renovations as well as for the complete cleaning of new commercial parks. Private customers value our discretion and the opportunity to include special requests such as ironing laundry or cleaning cellar compartments in the contract. Commercial customers, in turn, benefit from our SLA (Service Level Agreements), fixed contact persons and the ability to schedule cleaning times so that business operations are not disrupted in any way. We scale our services with your business: as you grow, our cleaning team simply grows with you.

faqs.question: How is the price for rough construction cleaning and fine cleaning calculated exactly?
faqs.answer: The calculation at SwissCleanMove is always transparent and fair. Depending on the specific service, we either work with fixed prices (e.g. final cleaning from CHF 350 or removals from CHF 490), with fixed hourly rates (e.g. household help from CHF 35/h) or prices per square meter. We always recommend a free on-site inspection in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland in order to be able to provide you with an exact and binding offer in which all costs are included.

faqs.question: Do you use your own equipment for rough construction cleaning and fine cleaning?
faqs.answer: In the vast majority of cases we bring everything ourselves. For commercial cleaning, construction cleaning, final cleaning and removals, our vehicles are fully equipped with professional vacuum cleaners, single-disc machines, cleaning products, ladders and tools. Only for private household helpers do we sometimes use their preferred devices on site at the customer's request.

faqs.question: How quickly can you be there in Biel/Bienne and the entire Zealand?
faqs.answer: Thanks to our strong regional structure, we are extremely responsive. In emergencies, such as the absence of a cleaner or after water damage, we can often mobilize a professional emergency team in the region within 24 to 48 hours. For work that can be planned, we recommend a lead time of 1-2 weeks.

faqs.question: What happens if something is damaged during work?
faqs.answer: Safety is our top priority. However, even with the greatest care, something can break. In this rare case, you as a customer are completely covered. We have very extensive business and professional liability insurance, which covers damage to your property in Switzerland without any problems.

faqs.question: Do you use subcontractors or freelancers?
faqs.answer: No, not consciously. In order to maintain our high quality standards for rough construction cleaning and fine cleaning, we rely exclusively on our own, permanently employed staff. This not only guarantees quality, but also protects you as a customer from any liability risks associated with undeclared work or a lack of insurance.

faqs.question: Are your employees trained in the areas of discretion and data protection?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. This is particularly important when cleaning offices and in private households. Each of our employees signs a strict confidentiality agreement. Data, files or private items are treated with absolute respect and discretion.

faqs.question: What cleaning products do you use?
faqs.answer: We focus on sustainability and material conservation. We use professional, biodegradable and eco-certified Swiss cleaning products that effectively combat dirt and bacteria, but are gentle on the surfaces of your property (such as real wood parquet or natural stone) and do not leave behind any toxic fumes.

faqs.question: Can I flexibly postpone or cancel the appointment for rough construction cleaning and fine cleaning?
faqs.answer: We value flexibility. Appointments can be rescheduled in accordance with our general terms and conditions. If you are ill or on vacation, you can pause or postpone maintenance cleaning operations in consultation with us without incurring any additional costs.

faqs.question: How are the services paid for?
faqs.answer: Payment is easy. After final cleaning or removals have been provided, you will receive a detailed invoice (payable within 10-30 days). For regular services such as office cleaning or house maintenance, we issue a clear collective invoice at the end of the month.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees on your work?
faqs.answer: Yes. For final cleaning after moving out, we provide a 100% acceptance guarantee, which contractually obliges us to clean up free of charge if there are any defects by the administration. For all other services, we also guarantee that the agreed specifications will be implemented error-free.

faqs.question: Do I have to be on site in Biel/Bienne and the entire Seeland during the work?
faqs.answer: This is not absolutely necessary. Many of our customers give us the key (often documented with a key receipt) so that we can carry out the work while they are away (or outside of office hours). Of course you are also welcome to be present.

faqs.question: Is it always the same person who comes to me?
faqs.answer: For recurring orders (such as household help, house maintenance or maintenance cleaning) we ensure that you are assigned a permanent team or a permanent reference person. Only in the event of vacation or illness do we organize a replacement who knows immediately what needs to be done thanks to the detailed specifications.

There are many providers throughout Switzerland, but SwissCleanMove stands out with its uncompromising focus on Swiss quality standards. We know exactly the specific requirements of customers in Zurich, Bern, Basel, Geneva, Lucerne, Solothurn, Fribourg, Neuchâtel and Jura. Our staff is locally anchored, which enables short travel distances, fast response times and a high level of flexibility. We know exactly the extremely strict requirements of Swiss property management companies. Another important aspect is our absolute transparency. With us there are no hidden costs, no unclear hourly surcharges and no unpleasant surprises on the invoice. We provide you with detailed, fair offers that we strictly adhere to. In addition, all of our employees are comprehensively insured (company liability, accident), so that you as the client are always on the safe side. We take care of the entire administrative process, which means maximum relief for you. Sit back and let the professionals do the hard work.

sections.heading: Our detailed work process
sections.body: A professional result when cleaning your move with an acceptance guarantee requires structured processes. At SwissCleanMove we leave nothing to chance. The first step is always a thorough needs analysis. We often carry out a free on-site visit throughout Switzerland to record the exact conditions. Our guarantee is real: We are present during acceptance and, if necessary, make improvements immediately free of charge. Based on this inspection, we create a tailor-made specification in which all tasks and intervals are recorded in detail. On the day of execution, our team arrives on time with the latest equipment and professional, material-friendly cleaning products or tools. Our team leaders monitor the execution on site and guarantee that the specifications are processed point by point. After completing the work, we carry out strict quality control. Only when we are 100% satisfied do we hand over the result to you. This structured process is the secret of our long-standing success and high customer satisfaction throughout Switzerland.

sections.heading: Local expertise and quick availability
sections.body: Thanks to our strong presence throughout Switzerland, we can offer moving cleaning services with an acceptance guarantee not only of the highest quality, but also with remarkable speed. We are familiar with the special features of the region, from the narrow streets in the old town to large commercial parks. Whether in an old building apartment in Bern or a modern loft in Zurich – our flat rates are fair. Especially in emergencies, be it a cleaning appointment that has been canceled at short notice, an urgent move or water damage that requires immediate cleaning, our on-call service proves its strength. We are often able to have a competent team on site in Zurich, Bern, Basel, Geneva, Lucerne, Solothurn, Friborg, Neuchâtel and Jura within 24 hours. We adapt to your schedule and also offer assignments on weekends, in the evenings or in the early hours of the morning so as not to disrupt your private or business activities.

sections.heading: Environmental awareness and sustainability
sections.body: As a modern Swiss company, we take responsibility for our environment. This is particularly true in the area of ​​cleaning. We have consistently aligned our processes for moving cleaning with an acceptance guarantee towards sustainability in recent years. Windows, blinds and stubborn limescale in Swiss bathrooms are always included in our fixed price. We primarily use biodegradable and eco-certified cleaning products that are effective against dirt but do not harm the flora and fauna around Lake Biel and Switzerland. We also use modern microfiber systems and special dosing systems to precisely dose water and chemical consumption. This not only protects the environment, but also protects the valuable surfaces of your furniture, floors and real estate. When it comes to moving and transport, we also pay attention to optimized route planning in order to keep the CO2 emissions of our modern vehicle fleet as low as possible.

sections.heading: Security, insurance and trust
sections.body: If you allow strangers access to your home or business premises throughout Switzerland, trust is the most important asset. SwissCleanMove is aware of this responsibility. All of our employees who are employed in the area of ​​moving cleaning with an acceptance guarantee go through a strict selection process, including checking their debt collection and criminal records, before being hired permanently. The cleaning is carried out by a permanent team, who often leave the entire apartment sparkling clean in 1-2 days. We also have comprehensive business and professional liability insurance. If a scratch occurs in the parquet or an object is damaged during our work, you are fully covered. We take responsibility – without discussions. This combination of careful personnel selection and strong insurance coverage gives our customers throughout Switzerland the reassuring feeling that they are in the best hands.

sections.heading: The advantages of a permanent position
sections.body: In contrast to many placement platforms that simply pass on orders to freelancers or subcontractors, we are a real employer. What does this mean for you when booking moving cleaning with an acceptance guarantee? It means consistent quality. Our employees identify with SwissCleanMove. You receive regular internal training on new cleaning techniques, workplace ergonomics and safety regulations. When you book moving and cleaning as a complete package in Switzerland, you benefit from top conditions. You also benefit from the fact that you can often greet the same familiar faces, which is particularly important for regular cleaning or house maintenance. You don’t have to worry about any administrative effort regarding AHV, SUVA or withholding tax – we take care of all of this. All you receive is a transparent, monthly invoice.

sections.heading: Tailor-made solutions for private and commercial use
sections.body: Every customer has different needs. A private household in Biel requires a different approach than an open-plan office in Bern or a branch in Zurich. When it comes to moving cleaning with an acceptance guarantee, we do not offer rigid packages, but rather completely flexible, modular solutions. You can conveniently only pay for the cleaning after you have successfully handed over the keys to the landlord. Private customers value our discretion and the opportunity to include special requests such as ironing laundry or cleaning cellar compartments in the contract. Commercial customers, in turn, benefit from our SLA (Service Level Agreements), fixed contact persons and the ability to schedule cleaning times so that business operations are not disrupted in any way. We scale our services with your business: as you grow, our cleaning team simply grows with you.

faqs.question: How is the price for moving cleaning with an acceptance guarantee calculated exactly?
faqs.answer: The calculation at SwissCleanMove is always transparent and fair. Depending on the specific service, we either work with fixed prices (e.g. final cleaning from CHF 350 or removals from CHF 490), with fixed hourly rates (e.g. household help from CHF 35/h) or prices per square meter. We always recommend a free on-site inspection throughout Switzerland in order to be able to provide you with an exact and binding offer that includes all costs.

faqs.question: Do you use your own equipment for moving cleaning with an acceptance guarantee?
faqs.answer: In the vast majority of cases we bring everything ourselves. For commercial cleaning, construction cleaning, final cleaning and removals, our vehicles are fully equipped with professional vacuum cleaners, single-disc machines, cleaning products, ladders and tools. Only for private household helpers do we sometimes use their preferred devices on site at the customer's request.

faqs.answer: Thanks to our strong regional structure, we are extremely responsive. For work that can be planned, we recommend a lead time of 1-2 weeks.

faqs.question: What happens if something is damaged during work?
faqs.answer: Safety is our top priority. However, even with the greatest care, something can break. In this rare case, you as a customer are completely covered. faqs.question: Do you use subcontractors or freelancers?

faqs.answer: We focus on sustainability and material conservation. sections.heading: Tailor-made solutions for private and commercial use
sections.body: Every customer has different needs. A private household in Biel requires a different approach than an open-plan office in Bern or a branch in Zurich. In the area of ​​professional home maintenance in Switzerland, we therefore do not offer rigid packages, but rather completely flexible, modular solutions. Regardless of whether it is a small condominium association or a huge residential complex – we have the right concept. Private customers value our discretion and the opportunity to include special requests such as ironing laundry or cleaning cellar compartments in the contract. Commercial customers, in turn, benefit from our SLA (Service Level Agreements), fixed contact persons and the ability to schedule cleaning times so that business operations are not disrupted in any way. We scale our services with your business: as you grow, our cleaning team simply grows with you.

faqs.question: How exactly is the price for professional home maintenance in Switzerland calculated?
faqs.answer: The calculation at SwissCleanMove is always transparent and fair. Depending on the specific service, we either work with fixed prices (e.g. final cleaning from CHF 350 or removals from CHF 490), with fixed hourly rates (e.g. household help from CHF 35/h) or prices per square meter. We always recommend a free on-site inspection throughout Switzerland in order to be able to provide you with an exact and binding offer that includes all costs.

faqs.question: Do you work with your own equipment for professional home maintenance in Switzerland?
faqs.answer: In the vast majority of cases we bring everything ourselves. For commercial cleaning, construction cleaning, final cleaning and removals, our vehicles are fully equipped with professional vacuum cleaners, single-disc machines, cleaning products, ladders and tools. Only for private household helpers do we sometimes use their preferred devices on site at the customer's request.

faqs.question: How quickly can you be on site throughout Switzerland?
faqs.answer: Thanks to our strong regional structure, we are extremely responsive. In emergencies, such as the absence of a cleaner or after water damage, we can often mobilize a professional emergency team in the region within 24 to 48 hours. For work that can be planned, we recommend a lead time of 1-2 weeks.

faqs.question: What happens if something is damaged during work?
faqs.answer: Safety is our top priority. However, even with the greatest care, something can break. In this rare case, you as a customer are completely covered. We have very extensive business and professional liability insurance, which covers damage to your property in Switzerland without any problems.

faqs.question: Do you use subcontractors or freelancers?
faqs.answer: No, not consciously. In order to maintain our high quality standards for professional home maintenance in Switzerland, we rely exclusively on our own, permanently employed staff. This not only guarantees quality, but also protects you as a customer from any liability risks associated with undeclared work or a lack of insurance.

faqs.question: Are your employees trained in the areas of discretion and data protection?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. This is particularly important when cleaning offices and in private households. Each of our employees signs a strict confidentiality agreement. Data, files or private items are treated with absolute respect and discretion.

faqs.question: What cleaning products do you use?
faqs.answer: We focus on sustainability and material conservation. We use professional, biodegradable and eco-certified Swiss cleaning products that effectively combat dirt and bacteria, but are gentle on the surfaces of your property (such as real wood parquet or natural stone) and do not leave behind any toxic fumes.

faqs.question: Can I flexibly postpone or cancel the appointment for professional home maintenance in Switzerland?
faqs.answer: We value flexibility. Appointments can be rescheduled in accordance with our general terms and conditions. If you are ill or on vacation, you can pause or postpone maintenance cleaning operations in consultation with us without incurring any additional costs.

faqs.question: How are the services paid for?
faqs.answer: Payment is easy. After final cleaning or removals have been provided, you will receive a detailed invoice (payable within 10-30 days). For regular services such as office cleaning or house maintenance, we issue a clear collective invoice at the end of the month.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees on your work?
faqs.answer: Yes. For final cleaning after moving out, we provide a 100% acceptance guarantee, which contractually obliges us to clean up free of charge if there are any defects by the administration. For all other services, we also guarantee that the agreed specifications will be implemented error-free.

faqs.question: Do I have to be anywhere in Switzerland during the work on site?
faqs.answer: This is not absolutely necessary. Many of our customers give us the key (often documented with a key receipt) so that we can carry out the work while they are away (or outside of office hours). Of course you are also welcome to be present.

faqs.question: Is it always the same person who comes to me?
faqs.answer: For recurring orders (such as household help, house maintenance or maintenance cleaning) we ensure that you are assigned a permanent team or a permanent reference person. Only in the event of vacation or illness do we organize a replacement who knows immediately what needs to be done thanks to the detailed specifications.
